raw_itrans.2.45: traiguNyaviShayA vedA nistraiguNyo bhavArjuna | nirdvandvo nityasattvastho niryogakShema AtmavAn
raw_itrans.2.46: yAvAnartha udapAne sarvataH samplutodake | tAvAnsarveShu vedeShu brAhmaNasya vijAnataH
raw_itrans.2.47: karmaNyevAdhikAraste mA phaleShu kadAchana | mA karmaphalaheturbhUrmA te sa~Ngo.astvakarmaNi
raw_itrans.2.48: yogasthaH kuru karmANi sa~Nga.n tyaktvA dhana~njaya | sid.hdhyasid.hdhyoH samo bhUtvA samatva.n yoga uchyate
raw_itrans.2.49: dUreNa hyavara.n karma buddhiyogAddhana~njaya | buddhau sharaNamanvichCha kR^ipaNAH phalahetavaH
raw_itrans.2.50: buddhiyukto jahAtIha ubhe sukR^itaduShkR^ite | tasmAdyogAya yujyasva yogaH karmasu kaushalam
raw_itrans.2.51: karmajaM buddhiyuktA hi phalaM tyaktvA manIShiNaH | janmabandhavinirmuktAH padaM gachChantyanAmayam
raw_itrans.2.52: yadA te mohakalilaM buddhirvyatitariShyati | tadA gantAsi nirvedaM shrotavyasya shrutasya cha
raw_itrans.2.53: shrutivipratipannA te yadA sthAsyati nishchalA | samAdhAvachalA buddhistadA yogamavApsyasi
raw_itrans.2.54: arjuna uvAcha | sthitapraj~nasya kA bhAShA samAdhisthasya keshava | sthitadhIH kiM prabhASheta kimAsIta vrajeta kim
raw_itrans.2.55: shrIbhagavAnuvAcha | prajahAti yadA kAmAnsarvAnpArtha manogatAn | AtmanyevAtmanA tuShTaH sthitapraj~nastadochyate
raw_itrans.2.57: yaH sarvatrAnabhisnehastattatprApya shubhAshubham | nAbhinandati na dveShTi tasya praj~nA pratiShThitA
raw_itrans.2.58: yadA sa.nharate chAyaM kUrmo.a~NgAnIva sarvashaH | indriyANIndriyArthebhyastasya praj~nA pratiShThitA
raw_itrans.2.59: viShayA vinivartante nirAhArasya dehinaH | rasavarja.n raso.apyasya para.n dR^iShTvA nivartate
raw_itrans.2.60: yatato hyapi kaunteya puruShasya vipashchitaH | indriyANi pramAthIni haranti prasabhaM manaH
raw_itrans.2.61: tAni sarvANi sa.nyamya yukta AsIta matparaH | vashe hi yasyendriyANi tasya praj~nA pratiShThitA
raw_itrans.2.62: dhyAyato viShayAnpu.nsaH sa~NgasteShUpajAyate | sa~NgAtsa~njAyate kAmaH kAmAtkrodho.abhijAyate
raw_itrans.2.63: krodhAdbhavati sammohaH sammohAtsmR^itivibhramaH | smR^itibhra.nshAd buddhinAsho buddhinAshAtpraNashyati
raw_itrans.2.65: prasAde sarvaduHkhAnA.n hAnirasyopajAyate | prasannachetaso hyAshu buddhiH paryavatiShThate
raw_itrans.2.66: nAsti buddhirayuktasya na chAyuktasya bhAvanA | na chAbhAvayataH shAntirashAntasya kutaH sukham
raw_itrans.2.67: indriyANAM hi charatAM yanmano.anuvidhIyate | tadasya harati praj~nAM vAyurnAvamivAmbhasi
raw_itrans.2.68: tasmAdyasya mahAbAho nigR^ihItAni sarvashaH | indriyANIndriyArthebhyastasya praj~nA pratiShThitA
raw_itrans.2.69: yA nishA sarvabhUtAnAM tasyA.n jAgarti sa.nyamI | yasyA.n jAgrati bhUtAni sA nishA pashyato muneH
raw_itrans.2.70: ApUryamANamachalapratiShTha.n samudramApaH pravishanti yadvat | tadvatkAmA yaM pravishanti sarve sa shAntimApnoti na kAmakAmI
raw_itrans.2.71: vihAya kAmAnyaH sarvAnpumA.nshcharati niHspR^ihaH | nirmamo niraha~NkAraH sa shAntimadhigachChati
raw_itrans.2.72: eShA brAhmI sthitiH pArtha nainAM prApya vimuhyati | sthitvAsyAmantakAle.api brahmanirvANamR^ichChati
raw_itrans.3.1: OM tatsaditi shrImadbhagavadgItAsUpaniShatsu brahmavidyAyA.n yogashAstre shrIkR^iShNArjunasa.nvAde sA~Nkhyayogo nAma dvitIyo.adhyAyaH || 2|| arjuna uvAcha | jyAyasI chetkarmaNaste matA buddhirjanArdana | tatki.n karmaNi ghore mA.n niyojayasi keshava
raw_itrans.3.2: vyAmishreNeva vAkyena buddhiM mohayasIva me | tadekaM vada nishchitya yena shreyo.ahamApnuyAm
raw_itrans.3.3: shrIbhagavAnuvAcha | loke.asmin dvividhA niShThA purA proktA mayAnagha | j~nAnayogena sA~NkhyAnA.n karmayogena yoginAm
raw_itrans.3.4: na karmaNAmanArambhAnnaiShkarmyaM puruSho.ashnute | na cha sa.nnyasanAdeva siddhi.n samadhigachChati
raw_itrans.3.5: na hi kashchitkShaNamapi jAtu tiShThatyakarmakR^it | kAryate hyavashaH karma sarvaH prakR^itijairguNaiH
raw_itrans.3.6: karmendriyANi sa.nyamya ya Aste manasA smaran | indriyArthAnvimUDhAtmA mithyAchAraH sa uchyate
raw_itrans.3.7: yastvindriyANi manasA niyamyArabhate.arjuna | karmendriyaiH karmayogamasaktaH sa vishiShyate
raw_itrans.3.8: niyata.n kuru karma tvaM karma jyAyo hyakarmaNaH | sharIrayAtrApi cha te na prasid.hdhyedakarmaNaH
raw_itrans.3.9: yaj~nArthAtkarmaNo.anyatra loko.aya.n karmabandhanaH | tadartha.n karma kaunteya muktasa~NgaH samAchara
raw_itrans.3.10: sahayaj~nAH prajAH sR^iShTvA purovAcha prajApatiH | anena prasaviShyadhvameSha vo.astviShTakAmadhuk
raw_itrans.3.11: devAnbhAvayatAnena te devA bhAvayantu vaH | parasparaM bhAvayantaH shreyaH paramavApsyatha
raw_itrans.3.12: iShTAnbhogAnhi vo devA dAsyante yaj~nabhAvitAH | tairdattAnapradAyaibhyo yo bhu~Nkte stena eva saH
raw_itrans.3.13: yaj~nashiShTAshinaH santo muchyante sarvakilbiShaiH | bhu~njate te tvaghaM pApA ye pachantyAtmakAraNAt
raw_itrans.3.14: annAdbhavanti bhUtAni parjanyAdannasambhavaH | yaj~nAdbhavati parjanyo yaj~naH karmasamudbhavaH
raw_itrans.3.15: karma brahmodbhava.n viddhi brahmAkSharasamudbhavam | tasmAtsarvagataM brahma nityaM yaj~ne pratiShThitam
raw_itrans.3.16: evaM pravartita.n chakraM nAnuvartayatIha yaH | aghAyurindriyArAmo moghaM pArtha sa jIvati
raw_itrans.3.17: yastvAtmaratireva syAdAtmatR^iptashcha mAnavaH | Atmanyeva cha santuShTastasya kAryaM na vidyate
raw_itrans.3.18: naiva tasya kR^itenArtho nAkR^iteneha kashchana | na chAsya sarvabhUteShu kashchidarthavyapAshrayaH
raw_itrans.3.19: tasmAdasaktaH satataM kAryaM karma samAchara | asakto hyAcharankarma paramApnoti pUruShaH
raw_itrans.3.20: karmaNaiva hi sa.nsiddhimAsthitA janakAdayaH | lokasa~NgrahamevApi sampashyankartumarhasi
raw_itrans.3.21: yadyadAcharati shreShThastattadevetaro janaH | sa yatpramANaM kurute lokastadanuvartate
raw_itrans.3.22: na me pArthAsti kartavyaM triShu lokeShu ki~nchana | nAnavAptamavAptavyaM varta eva cha karmaNi
raw_itrans.3.23: yadi hyahaM na varteya.n jAtu karmaNyatandritaH | mama vartmAnuvartante manuShyAH pArtha sarvashaH
raw_itrans.3.24: utsIdeyurime lokA na kuryA.n karma chedaham | sa~Nkarasya cha kartA syAmupahanyAmimAH prajAH
raw_itrans.3.26: na buddhibheda.n janayedaj~nAnA.n karmasa~NginAm | joShayetsarvakarmANi vidvAnyuktaH samAcharan
raw_itrans.3.27: prakR^iteH kriyamANAni guNaiH karmANi sarvashaH | aha~NkAravimUDhAtmA kartAhamiti manyate
raw_itrans.3.28: tattvavittu mahAbAho guNakarmavibhAgayoH | guNA guNeShu vartanta iti matvA na sajjate
raw_itrans.3.29: prakR^iterguNasammUDhAH sajjante guNakarmasu | tAnakR^itsnavido mandAnkR^itsnavinna vichAlayet
raw_itrans.3.30: mayi sarvANi karmANi sa.nnyasyAdhyAtmachetasA | nirAshIrnirmamo bhUtvA yudhyasva vigatajvaraH
raw_itrans.3.31: ye me matamidaM nityamanutiShThanti mAnavAH | shraddhAvanto.anasUyanto muchyante te.api karmabhiH
raw_itrans.3.32: ye tvetadabhyasUyanto nAnutiShThanti me matam | sarvaj~nAnavimUDhA.nstAnviddhi naShTAnachetasaH
raw_itrans.3.33: sadR^isha.n cheShTate svasyAH prakR^iterj~nAnavAnapi | prakR^iti.n yAnti bhUtAni nigrahaH kiM kariShyati
raw_itrans.3.34: indriyasyendriyasyArthe rAgadveShau vyavasthitau | tayorna vashamAgachChettau hyasya paripanthinau
raw_itrans.3.35: shreyAnsvadharmo viguNaH paradharmAtsvanuShThitAt | svadharme nidhana.n shreyaH paradharmo bhayAvahaH
raw_itrans.3.36: arjuna uvAcha | atha kena prayukto.ayaM pApa.n charati pUruShaH | anichChannapi vArShNeya balAdiva niyojitaH
raw_itrans.3.37: shrIbhagavAnuvAcha | kAma eSha krodha eSha rajoguNasamudbhavaH | mahAshano mahApApmA vid.hdhyenamiha vairiNam
raw_itrans.3.38: dhUmenAvriyate vahniryathAdarsho malena cha | yatholbenAvR^ito garbhastathA tenedamAvR^itam
raw_itrans.3.39: AvR^itaM j~nAnametena j~nAnino nityavairiNA | kAmarUpeNa kaunteya duShpUreNAnalena cha
raw_itrans.3.40: indriyANi mano buddhirasyAdhiShThAnamuchyate | etairvimohayatyeSha j~nAnamAvR^itya dehinam
raw_itrans.3.41: tasmAttvamindriyANyAdau niyamya bharatarShabha | pApmAnaM prajahi hyenaM j~nAnavij~nAnanAshanam
raw_itrans.3.42: indriyANi parANyAhurindriyebhyaH paraM manaH | manasastu parA buddhiryo buddheH paratastu saH
raw_itrans.3.43: evaM buddheH paraM buddhvA sa.nstabhyAtmAnamAtmanA | jahi shatruM mahAbAho kAmarUpaM durAsadam
raw_itrans.4.1: OM tatsaditi shrImadbhagavadgItAsUpaniShatsu brahmavidyAyA.n yogashAstre shrIkR^iShNArjunasa.nvAde karmayogo nAma tR^itIyo.adhyAyaH || 3|| shrIbhagavAnuvAcha | imaM vivasvate yogaM proktavAnahamavyayam | vivasvAnmanave prAha manurikShvAkave.abravIt
raw_itrans.4.2: evaM paramparAprAptamimaM rAjarShayo viduH | sa kAleneha mahatA yogo naShTaH parantapa
raw_itrans.4.3: sa evAyaM mayA te.adya yogaH proktaH purAtanaH | bhakto.asi me sakhA cheti rahasyaM hyetaduttamam
raw_itrans.4.4: arjuna uvAcha | aparaM bhavato janma para.n janma vivasvataH | kathametadvijAnIyA.n tvamAdau proktavAniti
raw_itrans.4.5: shrIbhagavAnuvAcha | bahUni me vyatItAni janmAni tava chArjuna | tAnyahaM veda sarvANi na tvaM vettha parantapa
raw_itrans.4.6: ajo.api sannavyayAtmA bhUtAnAmIshvaro.api san | prakR^iti.n svAmadhiShThAya sambhavAmyAtmamAyayA
raw_itrans.4.7: yadA yadA hi dharmasya glAnirbhavati bhArata | abhyutthAnamadharmasya tadAtmAnaM sR^ijAmyaham
raw_itrans.4.8: paritrANAya sAdhUnA.n vinAshAya cha duShkR^itAm | dharmasa.nsthApanArthAya sambhavAmi yuge yuge
raw_itrans.4.9: janma karma cha me divyamevaM yo vetti tattvataH | tyaktvA dehaM punarjanma naiti mAmeti so.arjuna
raw_itrans.4.10: vItarAgabhayakrodhA manmayA mAmupAshritAH | bahavo j~nAnatapasA pUtA madbhAvamAgatAH
raw_itrans.4.11: ye yathA mAM prapadyante tA.nstathaiva bhajAmyaham | mama vartmAnuvartante manuShyAH pArtha sarvashaH
raw_itrans.4.12: kA~NkShantaH karmaNA.n siddhi.n yajanta iha devatAH | kShipra.n hi mAnuShe loke siddhirbhavati karmajA
raw_itrans.4.13: chAturvarNyaM mayA sR^iShTa.n guNakarmavibhAgashaH | tasya kartAramapi mA.n vid.hdhyakartAramavyayam
raw_itrans.4.14: na mA.n karmANi limpanti na me karmaphale spR^ihA | iti mA.n yo.abhijAnAti karmabhirna sa badhyate
raw_itrans.4.15: eva.n j~nAtvA kR^itaM karma pUrvairapi mumukShubhiH | kuru karmaiva tasmAttvaM pUrvaiH pUrvatara.n kR^itam
raw_itrans.4.16: ki.n karma kimakarmeti kavayo.apyatra mohitAH | tatte karma pravakShyAmi yajj~nAtvA mokShyase.ashubhAt
raw_itrans.4.17: karmaNo hyapi boddhavyaM boddhavya.n cha vikarmaNaH | akarmaNashcha boddhavya.n gahanA karmaNo gatiH
raw_itrans.4.18: karmaNyakarma yaH pashyedakarmaNi cha karma yaH | sa buddhimAnmanuShyeShu sa yuktaH kR^itsnakarmakR^it
raw_itrans.4.19: yasya sarve samArambhAH kAmasa~NkalpavarjitAH | j~nAnAgnidagdhakarmANa.n tamAhuH paNDitaM budhAH
raw_itrans.4.20: tyaktvA karmaphalAsa~Nga.n nityatR^ipto nirAshrayaH | karmaNyabhipravR^itto.api naiva ki~nchitkaroti saH
raw_itrans.4.21: nirAshIryatachittAtmA tyaktasarvaparigrahaH | shArIraM kevalaM karma kurvannApnoti kilbiSham
raw_itrans.4.22: yadR^ichChAlAbhasantuShTo dvandvAtIto vimatsaraH | samaH siddhAvasiddhau cha kR^itvApi na nibadhyate
raw_itrans.4.23: gatasa~Ngasya muktasya j~nAnAvasthitachetasaH | yaj~nAyAcharataH karma samagraM pravilIyate
raw_itrans.4.24: brahmArpaNaM brahma havirbrahmAgnau brahmaNA hutam | brahmaiva tena gantavyaM brahmakarmasamAdhinA
raw_itrans.4.25: daivamevApare yaj~na.n yoginaH paryupAsate | brahmAgnAvapare yaj~naM yaj~nenaivopajuhvati
raw_itrans.4.26: shrotrAdInIndriyANyanye sa.nyamAgniShu juhvati | shabdAdInviShayAnanya indriyAgniShu juhvati
raw_itrans.4.27: sarvANIndriyakarmANi prANakarmANi chApare | Atmasa.nyamayogAgnau juhvati j~nAnadIpite
raw_itrans.4.29: apAne juhvati prANaM prANe.apAnaM tathApare | prANApAnagatI rud.hdhvA prANAyAmaparAyaNAH
raw_itrans.4.30: apare niyatAhArAH prANAnprANeShu juhvati | sarve.apyete yaj~navido yaj~nakShapitakalmaShAH
raw_itrans.4.31: yaj~nashiShTAmR^itabhujo yAnti brahma sanAtanam | nAyaM loko.astyayaj~nasya kuto.anyaH kurusattama
raw_itrans.4.32: evaM bahuvidhA yaj~nA vitatA brahmaNo mukhe | karmajAnviddhi tAnsarvAnevaM j~nAtvA vimokShyase
raw_itrans.4.33: shreyAndravyamayAdyaj~nAjj~nAnayaj~naH parantapa | sarva.n karmAkhilaM pArtha j~nAne parisamApyate
raw_itrans.4.34: tadviddhi praNipAtena pariprashnena sevayA | upadekShyanti te j~nAnaM j~nAninastattvadarshinaH
raw_itrans.4.35: yajj~nAtvA na punarmohamevaM yAsyasi pANDava | yena bhUtAnyasheSheNa drakShyasyAtmanyatho mayi
raw_itrans.4.36: api chedasi pApebhyaH sarvebhyaH pApakR^ittamaH | sarva.n j~nAnaplavenaiva vR^ijinaM santariShyasi
raw_itrans.4.37: yathaidhA.nsi samiddho.agnirbhasmasAtkurute.arjuna | j~nAnAgniH sarvakarmANi bhasmasAtkurute tathA
raw_itrans.4.38: na hi j~nAnena sadR^ishaM pavitramiha vidyate | tatsvayaM yogasa.nsiddhaH kAlenAtmani vindati
raw_itrans.4.39: shraddhAvA.Nllabhate j~nAnaM tatparaH sa.nyatendriyaH | j~nAnaM labdhvA parAM shAntimachireNAdhigachChati
raw_itrans.4.40: aj~nashchAshraddadhAnashcha sa.nshayAtmA vinashyati | nAyaM loko.asti na paro na sukhaM sa.nshayAtmanaH
raw_itrans.4.41: yogasa.nnyastakarmANaM j~nAnasa~nChinnasa.nshayam | AtmavantaM na karmANi nibadhnanti dhana~njaya
raw_itrans.4.42: tasmAdaj~nAnasambhUtaM hR^itstha.n j~nAnAsinAtmanaH | ChittvainaM sa.nshayaM yogamAtiShThottiShTha bhArata
raw_itrans.5.1: OM tatsaditi shrImadbhagavadgItAsUpaniShatsu brahmavidyAyA.n yogashAstre shrIkR^iShNArjunasa.nvAde j~nAnakarmasa.nnyAsayogo nAma chaturtho.adhyAyaH || 4|| arjuna uvAcha | sa.nnyAsaM karmaNA.n kR^iShNa punaryoga.n cha sha.nsasi | yachChreya etayorekaM tanme brUhi sunishchitam
raw_itrans.5.2: shrIbhagavAnuvAcha | sa.nnyAsaH karmayogashcha niHshreyasakarAvubhau | tayostu karmasa.nnyAsAtkarmayogo vishiShyate
raw_itrans.5.3: j~neyaH sa nityasa.nnyAsI yo na dveShTi na kA~NkShati | nirdvandvo hi mahAbAho sukhaM bandhAtpramuchyate
raw_itrans.5.4: sA~Nkhyayogau pR^ithagbAlAH pravadanti na paNDitAH | ekamapyAsthitaH samyagubhayorvindate phalam
raw_itrans.5.5: yatsA~NkhyaiH prApyate sthAnaM tadyogairapi gamyate | ekaM sA~Nkhya.n cha yoga.n cha yaH pashyati sa pashyati
raw_itrans.5.6: sa.nnyAsastu mahAbAho duHkhamAptumayogataH | yogayukto munirbrahma nachireNAdhigachChati
raw_itrans.5.7: yogayukto vishuddhAtmA vijitAtmA jitendriyaH | sarvabhUtAtmabhUtAtmA kurvannapi na lipyate
raw_itrans.5.10: brahmaNyAdhAya karmANi sa~Nga.n tyaktvA karoti yaH | lipyate na sa pApena padmapatramivAmbhasA
raw_itrans.5.11: kAyena manasA bud.hdhyA kevalairindriyairapi | yoginaH karma kurvanti sa~Nga.n tyaktvAtmashuddhaye
raw_itrans.5.12: yuktaH karmaphalaM tyaktvA shAntimApnoti naiShThikIm | ayuktaH kAmakAreNa phale sakto nibadhyate
raw_itrans.5.13: sarvakarmANi manasA sa.nnyasyAste sukhaM vashI | navadvAre pure dehI naiva kurvanna kArayan
raw_itrans.5.14: na kartR^itva.n na karmANi lokasya sR^ijati prabhuH | na karmaphalasa.nyogaM svabhAvastu pravartate
raw_itrans.5.15: nAdatte kasyachitpApaM na chaiva sukR^itaM vibhuH | aj~nAnenAvR^itaM j~nAnaM tena muhyanti jantavaH
raw_itrans.5.16: j~nAnena tu tadaj~nAnaM yeShA.n nAshitamAtmanaH | teShAmAdityavajj~nAnaM prakAshayati tatparam
raw_itrans.5.18: vidyAvinayasampanne brAhmaNe gavi hastini | shuni chaiva shvapAke cha paNDitAH samadarshinaH
raw_itrans.5.19: ihaiva tairjitaH sargo yeShA.n sAmye sthitaM manaH | nirdoShaM hi samaM brahma tasmAd brahmaNi te sthitAH
raw_itrans.5.20: na prahR^iShyetpriyaM prApya nodvijetprApya chApriyam | sthirabuddhirasammUDho brahmavid brahmaNi sthitaH
raw_itrans.5.21: bAhyasparsheShvasaktAtmA vindatyAtmani yatsukham | sa brahmayogayuktAtmA sukhamakShayamashnute
raw_itrans.5.22: ye hi sa.nsparshajA bhogA duHkhayonaya eva te | AdyantavantaH kaunteya na teShu ramate budhaH
raw_itrans.5.23: shaknotIhaiva yaH soDhuM prAksharIravimokShaNAt | kAmakrodhodbhavaM vegaM sa yuktaH sa sukhI naraH
raw_itrans.5.25: labhante brahmanirvANamR^iShayaH kShINakalmaShAH | ChinnadvaidhA yatAtmAnaH sarvabhUtahite ratAH
raw_itrans.5.26: kAmakrodhaviyuktAnA.n yatInA.n yatachetasAm | abhito brahmanirvANaM vartate viditAtmanAm
raw_itrans.5.27: sparshAnkR^itvA bahirbAhyA.nshchakShushchaivAntare bhruvoH | prANApAnau samau kR^itvA nAsAbhyantarachAriNau
raw_itrans.5.28: yatendriyamanobuddhirmunirmokShaparAyaNaH | vigatechChAbhayakrodho yaH sadA mukta eva saH
raw_itrans.5.29: bhoktAraM yaj~natapasA.n sarvalokamaheshvaram | suhR^idaM sarvabhUtAnA.n j~nAtvA mA.n shAntimR^ichChati
raw_itrans.6.1: OM tatsaditi shrImadbhagavadgItAsUpaniShatsu brahmavidyAyA.n yogashAstre shrIkR^iShNArjunasa.nvAde sa.nnyAsayogo nAma pa~nchamo.adhyAyaH || 5|| shrIbhagavAnuvAcha | anAshritaH karmaphalaM kArya.n karma karoti yaH | sa sa.nnyAsI cha yogI cha na niragnirna chAkriyaH
raw_itrans.6.2: yaM sa.nnyAsamiti prAhuryogaM taM viddhi pANDava | na hyasa.nnyastasa~Nkalpo yogI bhavati kashchana
raw_itrans.6.3: ArurukShormuneryogaM karma kAraNamuchyate | yogArUDhasya tasyaiva shamaH kAraNamuchyate
raw_itrans.6.4: yadA hi nendriyArtheShu na karmasvanuShajjate | sarvasa~Nkalpasa.nnyAsI yogArUDhastadochyate
raw_itrans.6.5: uddharedAtmanAtmAnaM nAtmAnamavasAdayet | Atmaiva hyAtmano bandhurAtmaiva ripurAtmanaH
raw_itrans.6.6: bandhurAtmAtmanastasya yenAtmaivAtmanA jitaH | anAtmanastu shatrutve vartetAtmaiva shatruvat
raw_itrans.6.7: jitAtmanaH prashAntasya paramAtmA samAhitaH | shItoShNasukhaduHkheShu tathA mAnApamAnayoH
raw_itrans.6.8: j~nAnavij~nAnatR^iptAtmA kUTastho vijitendriyaH | yukta ityuchyate yogI samaloShTAshmakA~nchanaH
raw_itrans.6.10: yogI yu~njIta satatamAtmAnaM rahasi sthitaH | ekAkI yatachittAtmA nirAshIraparigrahaH
raw_itrans.6.11: shuchau deshe pratiShThApya sthiramAsanamAtmanaH | nAtyuchChritaM nAtinIcha.n chailAjinakushottaram
raw_itrans.6.12: tatraikAgraM manaH kR^itvA yatachittendriyakriyaH | upavishyAsane yu~njyAdyogamAtmavishuddhaye
raw_itrans.6.13: samaM kAyashirogrIvaM dhArayannachalaM sthiraH | samprekShya nAsikAgraM svaM dishashchAnavalokayan
raw_itrans.6.14: prashAntAtmA vigatabhIrbrahmachArivrate sthitaH | manaH sa.nyamya machchitto yukta AsIta matparaH
raw_itrans.6.15: yu~njannevaM sadAtmAnaM yogI niyatamAnasaH | shAnti.n nirvANaparamAM matsa.nsthAmadhigachChati
raw_itrans.6.16: nAtyashnatastu yogo.asti na chaikAntamanashnataH | na chAtisvapnashIlasya jAgrato naiva chArjuna
raw_itrans.6.17: yuktAhAravihArasya  yuktacheShTasya karmasu | yuktasvapnAvabodhasya yogo bhavati duHkhahA
raw_itrans.6.18: yadA viniyata.n chittamAtmanyevAvatiShThate | niHspR^ihaH sarvakAmebhyo yukta ityuchyate tadA
raw_itrans.6.19: yathA dIpo nivAtastho ne~Ngate sopamA smR^itA | yogino yatachittasya yu~njato yogamAtmanaH
raw_itrans.6.20: yatroparamate chittaM niruddhaM yogasevayA | yatra chaivAtmanAtmAnaM pashyannAtmani tuShyati
raw_itrans.6.21: sukhamAtyantikaM yattad buddhigrAhyamatIndriyam | vetti yatra na chaivAyaM sthitashchalati tattvataH
raw_itrans.6.22: yaM labdhvA chAparaM lAbhaM manyate nAdhikaM tataH | yasminsthito na duHkhena guruNApi vichAlyate
raw_itrans.6.23: taM vidyAd duHkhasa.nyogaviyogaM yogasa.nj~nitam | sa nishchayena yoktavyo yogo.anirviNNachetasA
raw_itrans.6.25: shanaiH shanairuparamed bud.hdhyA dhR^itigR^ihItayA | Atmasa.nsthaM manaH kR^itvA na ki~nchidapi chintayet
raw_itrans.6.26: yato yato nishcharati manashcha~nchalamasthiram | tatastato niyamyaitadAtmanyeva vashaM nayet
raw_itrans.6.27: prashAntamanasaM hyenaM yoginaM sukhamuttamam | upaiti shAntarajasaM brahmabhUtamakalmaSham
raw_itrans.6.28: yu~njannevaM sadAtmAnaM yogI vigatakalmaShaH | sukhena brahmasa.nsparshamatyantaM sukhamashnute
raw_itrans.6.29: sarvabhUtasthamAtmAnaM sarvabhUtAni chAtmani | IkShate yogayuktAtmA sarvatra samadarshanaH
raw_itrans.6.30: yo mAM pashyati sarvatra sarva.n cha mayi pashyati | tasyAhaM na praNashyAmi sa cha me na praNashyati
raw_itrans.6.31: sarvabhUtasthitaM yo mAM bhajatyekatvamAsthitaH | sarvathA vartamAno.api sa yogI mayi vartate
raw_itrans.6.32: Atmaupamyena sarvatra samaM pashyati yo.arjuna | sukhaM vA yadi vA duHkhaM sa yogI paramo mataH
raw_itrans.6.33: arjuna uvAcha | yo.ayaM yogastvayA proktaH sAmyena madhusUdana | etasyAhaM na pashyAmi cha~nchalatvAtsthiti.n sthirAm
raw_itrans.6.34: cha~nchalaM hi manaH kR^iShNa pramAthi balavad dR^iDham | tasyAhaM nigrahaM manye vAyoriva suduShkaram
raw_itrans.6.35: shrIbhagavAnuvAcha | asa.nshayaM mahAbAho mano durnigraha.n chalam | abhyAsena tu kaunteya vairAgyeNa cha gR^ihyate
raw_itrans.6.36: asa.nyatAtmanA yogo duShprApa iti me matiH | vashyAtmanA tu yatatA shakyo.avAptumupAyataH
raw_itrans.6.37: arjuna uvAcha | ayatiH shraddhayopeto yogAchchalitamAnasaH | aprApya yogasa.nsiddhi.n kA.n gati.n kR^iShNa gachChati
raw_itrans.6.38: kachchinnobhayavibhraShTashChinnAbhramiva nashyati | apratiShTho mahAbAho vimUDho brahmaNaH pathi
raw_itrans.6.39: etanme sa.nshayaM kR^iShNa ChettumarhasyasheShataH | tvadanyaH sa.nshayasyAsya ChettA na hyupapadyate
raw_itrans.6.40: shrIbhagavAnuvAcha | pArtha naiveha nAmutra vinAshastasya vidyate | na hi kalyANakR^itkashchid durgati.n tAta gachChati
raw_itrans.6.41: prApya puNyakR^itA.n lokAnuShitvA shAshvatIH samAH | shuchInA.n shrImatA.n gehe yogabhraShTo.abhijAyate
raw_itrans.6.42: athavA yoginAmeva kule bhavati dhImatAm | etaddhi durlabhataraM loke janma yadIdR^isham
raw_itrans.6.43: tatra taM buddhisa.nyogaM labhate paurvadehikam | yatate cha tato bhUyaH sa.nsiddhau kurunandana
raw_itrans.6.44: pUrvAbhyAsena tenaiva hriyate hyavasho.api saH | jij~nAsurapi yogasya shabdabrahmAtivartate
raw_itrans.6.45: prayatnAdyatamAnastu yogI sa.nshuddhakilbiShaH | anekajanmasa.nsiddhastato yAti parAM gatim
raw_itrans.6.46: tapasvibhyo.adhiko yogI j~nAnibhyo.api mato.adhikaH | karmibhyashchAdhiko yogI tasmAdyogI bhavArjuna
raw_itrans.6.47: yoginAmapi sarveShAM mad.hgatenAntarAtmanA | shraddhAvAnbhajate yo mA.n sa me yuktatamo mataH
raw_itrans.7.1: OM tatsaditi shrImadbhagavadgItAsUpaniShatsu brahmavidyAyA.n yogashAstre shrIkR^iShNArjunasa.nvAde Atmasa.nyamayogo nAma ShaShTho.adhyAyaH || 6|| shrIbhagavAnuvAcha | mayyAsaktamanAH pArtha yogaM yu~njanmadAshrayaH | asa.nshayaM samagraM mA.n yathA j~nAsyasi tachChR^iNu
raw_itrans.7.2: j~nAnaM te.ahaM savij~nAnamidaM vakShyAmyasheShataH | yajj~nAtvA neha bhUyo.anyajj~nAtavyamavashiShyate
raw_itrans.7.3: manuShyANA.n sahasreShu kashchidyatati siddhaye | yatatAmapi siddhAnA.n kashchinmA.n vetti tattvataH
raw_itrans.7.4: bhUmirApo.analo vAyuH khaM mano buddhireva cha | aha~NkAra itIyaM me bhinnA prakR^itiraShTadhA
raw_itrans.7.5: apareyamitastvanyAM prakR^iti.n viddhi me parAm | jIvabhUtAM mahAbAho yayedaM dhAryate jagat
raw_itrans.7.6: etadyonIni bhUtAni sarvANItyupadhAraya | ahaM kR^itsnasya jagataH prabhavaH pralayastathA
raw_itrans.7.7: mattaH parataraM nAnyatki~nchidasti dhana~njaya | mayi sarvamidaM protaM sUtre maNigaNA iva
raw_itrans.7.8: raso.ahamapsu kaunteya prabhAsmi shashisUryayoH | praNavaH sarvavedeShu shabdaH khe pauruShaM nR^iShu
raw_itrans.7.9: puNyo gandhaH pR^ithivyA.n cha tejashchAsmi vibhAvasau | jIvanaM sarvabhUteShu tapashchAsmi tapasviShu
raw_itrans.7.10: bIjaM mA.n sarvabhUtAnA.n viddhi pArtha sanAtanam | buddhirbuddhimatAmasmi tejastejasvinAmaham
raw_itrans.7.11: balaM balavatA.n chAhaM kAmarAgavivarjitam | dharmAviruddho bhUteShu kAmo.asmi bharatarShabha
raw_itrans.7.12: ye chaiva sAttvikA bhAvA rAjasAstAmasAshcha ye | matta eveti tAnviddhi na tvahaM teShu te mayi
raw_itrans.7.13: tribhirguNamayairbhAvairebhiH sarvamida.n jagat | mohitaM nAbhijAnAti mAmebhyaH paramavyayam
raw_itrans.7.14: daivI hyeShA guNamayI mama mAyA duratyayA | mAmeva ye prapadyante mAyAmetAM taranti te
raw_itrans.7.15: na mA.n duShkR^itino mUDhAH prapadyante narAdhamAH | mAyayApahR^itaj~nAnA AsuraM bhAvamAshritAH
raw_itrans.7.16: chaturvidhA bhajante mA.n janAH sukR^itino.arjuna | Arto jij~nAsurarthArthI j~nAnI cha bharatarShabha
raw_itrans.7.17: teShA.n j~nAnI nityayukta ekabhaktirvishiShyate | priyo hi j~nAnino.atyarthamahaM sa cha mama priyaH
raw_itrans.7.18: udArAH sarva evaite j~nAnI tvAtmaiva me matam | AsthitaH sa hi yuktAtmA mAmevAnuttamA.n gatim
raw_itrans.7.19: bahUnA.n janmanAmante j~nAnavAnmAM prapadyate | vAsudevaH sarvamiti sa mahAtmA sudurlabhaH
raw_itrans.7.20: kAmaistaistairhR^itaj~nAnAH prapadyante.anyadevatAH | taM taM niyamamAsthAya prakR^ityA niyatAH svayA
raw_itrans.7.21: yo yo yA.n yA.n tanuM bhaktaH shraddhayArchitumichChati | tasya tasyAchalA.n shraddhA.n tAmeva vidadhAmyaham
raw_itrans.7.22: sa tayA shraddhayA yuktastasyArAdhanamIhate | labhate cha tataH kAmAnmayaiva vihitAnhi tAn
raw_itrans.7.23: antavattu phalaM teShA.n tadbhavatyalpamedhasAm | devAndevayajo yAnti madbhaktA yAnti mAmapi
raw_itrans.7.24: avyaktaM vyaktimApannaM manyante mAmabuddhayaH | paraM bhAvamajAnanto mamAvyayamanuttamam
raw_itrans.7.25: nAhaM prakAshaH sarvasya yogamAyAsamAvR^itaH | mUDho.ayaM nAbhijAnAti loko mAmajamavyayam
raw_itrans.7.26: vedAhaM samatItAni vartamAnAni chArjuna | bhaviShyANi cha bhUtAni mA.n tu veda na kashchana
raw_itrans.7.27: ichChAdveShasamutthena dvandvamohena bhArata | sarvabhUtAni sammohaM sarge yAnti parantapa
raw_itrans.7.28: yeShA.n tvantagataM pApa.n janAnAM puNyakarmaNAm | te dvandvamohanirmuktA bhajante mA.n dR^iDhavratAH
raw_itrans.7.29: jarAmaraNamokShAya mAmAshritya yatanti ye | te brahma tadviduH kR^itsnamadhyAtmaM karma chAkhilam
raw_itrans.7.30: sAdhibhUtAdhidaivaM mA.n sAdhiyaj~na.n cha ye viduH | prayANakAle.api cha mA.n te viduryuktachetasaH
raw_itrans.8.1: OM tatsaditi shrImadbhagavadgItAsUpaniShatsu brahmavidyAyA.n yogashAstre shrIkR^iShNArjunasa.nvAde j~nAnavij~nAnayogo nAma saptamo.adhyAyaH || 7|| arjuna uvAcha | ki.n tad brahma kimadhyAtma.n kiM karma puruShottama | adhibhUta.n cha kiM proktamadhidaivaM kimuchyate
raw_itrans.8.2: adhiyaj~naH kathaM ko.atra dehe.asminmadhusUdana | prayANakAle cha kathaM j~neyo.asi niyatAtmabhiH
raw_itrans.8.3: shrIbhagavAnuvAcha | akSharaM brahma paramaM svabhAvo.adhyAtmamuchyate | bhUtabhAvodbhavakaro visargaH karmasa.nj~nitaH
raw_itrans.8.4: adhibhUtaM kSharo bhAvaH puruShashchAdhidaivatam | adhiyaj~no.ahamevAtra dehe dehabhR^itA.n vara
raw_itrans.8.5: antakAle cha mAmeva smaranmuktvA kalevaram | yaH prayAti sa madbhAvaM yAti nAstyatra sa.nshayaH
raw_itrans.8.6: yaM yaM vApi smaranbhAvaM tyajatyante kalevaram | taM tamevaiti kaunteya sadA tadbhAvabhAvitaH
raw_itrans.8.8: abhyAsayogayuktena chetasA nAnyagAminA | paramaM puruShaM divya.n yAti pArthAnuchintayan
raw_itrans.8.9: kaviM purANamanushAsitAra\- maNoraNIya.nsamanusmaredyaH | sarvasya dhAtAramachintyarUpa\- mAdityavarNaM tamasaH parastAt
raw_itrans.8.10: prayANakAle manasA.achalena bhaktyA yukto yogabalena chaiva | bhruvormadhye prANamAveshya samyak.h sa taM paraM puruShamupaiti divyam
raw_itrans.8.11: yadakSharaM vedavido vadanti vishanti yadyatayo vItarAgAH | yadichChanto brahmacharya.n charanti tatte padaM sa~NgraheNa pravakShye
raw_itrans.8.12: sarvadvArANi sa.nyamya mano hR^idi nirudhya cha | mUrdhnyAdhAyAtmanaH prANamAsthito yogadhAraNAm
raw_itrans.8.13: omityekAkSharaM brahma vyAharanmAmanusmaran | yaH prayAti tyajandehaM sa yAti paramA.n gatim
raw_itrans.8.14: ananyachetAH satataM yo mA.n smarati nityashaH | tasyAhaM sulabhaH pArtha nityayuktasya yoginaH
raw_itrans.8.15: mAmupetya punarjanma duHkhAlayamashAshvatam | nApnuvanti mahAtmAnaH sa.nsiddhiM paramA.n gatAH
raw_itrans.8.16: AbrahmabhuvanAllokAH punarAvartino.arjuna | mAmupetya tu kaunteya punarjanma na vidyate
raw_itrans.8.17: sahasrayugaparyantamaharyad brahmaNo viduH | rAtri.n yugasahasrAntA.n te.ahorAtravido janAH
raw_itrans.8.18: avyaktAd vyaktayaH sarvAH prabhavantyaharAgame | rAtryAgame pralIyante tatraivAvyaktasa.nj~nake
raw_itrans.8.19: bhUtagrAmaH sa evAyaM bhUtvA bhUtvA pralIyate | rAtryAgame.avashaH pArtha prabhavatyaharAgame
raw_itrans.8.20: parastasmAttu bhAvo.anyo.avyakto.avyaktAtsanAtanaH | yaH sa sarveShu bhUteShu nashyatsu na vinashyati
raw_itrans.8.21: avyakto.akShara ityuktastamAhuH paramA.n gatim | yaM prApya na nivartante taddhAma paramaM mama
raw_itrans.8.22: puruShaH sa paraH pArtha bhaktyA labhyastvananyayA | yasyAntaHsthAni bhUtAni yena sarvamidaM tatam
raw_itrans.8.23: yatra kAle tvanAvR^ittimAvR^itti.n chaiva yoginaH | prayAtA yAnti taM kAlaM vakShyAmi bharatarShabha
raw_itrans.8.24: agnirjyotirahaH shuklaH ShaNmAsA uttarAyaNam | tatra prayAtA gachChanti brahma brahmavido janAH
raw_itrans.8.25: dhUmo rAtristathA kR^iShNaH ShaNmAsA dakShiNAyanam | tatra chAndramasa.n jyotiryogI prApya nivartate
raw_itrans.8.26: shuklakR^iShNe gatI hyete jagataH shAshvate mate | ekayA yAtyanAvR^ittimanyayAvartate punaH
raw_itrans.8.27: naite sR^itI pArtha jAnanyogI muhyati kashchana | tasmAtsarveShu kAleShu yogayukto bhavArjuna
raw_itrans.8.28: vedeShu yaj~neShu tapaHsu chaiva dAneShu yatpuNyaphalaM pradiShTam | atyeti tatsarvamidaM viditvA yogI paraM sthAnamupaiti chAdyam
raw_itrans.9.1: OM tatsaditi shrImadbhagavadgItAsUpaniShatsu brahmavidyAyA.n yogashAstre shrIkR^iShNArjunasa.nvAde akSharabrahmayogo nAmAShTamo.adhyAyaH || 8|| shrIbhagavAnuvAcha | idaM tu te guhyatamaM pravakShyAmyanasUyave | j~nAnaM vij~nAnasahitaM yajj~nAtvA mokShyase.ashubhAt
raw_itrans.9.2: rAjavidyA rAjaguhyaM pavitramidamuttamam | pratyakShAvagamaM dharmya.n susukhaM kartumavyayam
raw_itrans.9.3: ashraddadhAnAH puruShA dharmasyAsya parantapa | aprApya mA.n nivartante mR^ityusa.nsAravartmani
raw_itrans.9.4: mayA tatamidaM sarva.n jagadavyaktamUrtinA | matsthAni sarvabhUtAni na chAhaM teShvavasthitaH
raw_itrans.9.5: na cha matsthAni bhUtAni pashya me yogamaishvaram | bhUtabhR^inna cha bhUtastho mamAtmA bhUtabhAvanaH
raw_itrans.9.6: yathAkAshasthito nitya.n vAyuH sarvatrago mahAn | tathA sarvANi bhUtAni matsthAnItyupadhAraya
raw_itrans.9.7: sarvabhUtAni kaunteya prakR^iti.n yAnti mAmikAm | kalpakShaye punastAni kalpAdau visR^ijAmyaham
raw_itrans.9.8: prakR^iti.n svAmavaShTabhya visR^ijAmi punaH punaH | bhUtagrAmamimaM kR^itsnamavashaM prakR^itervashAt
raw_itrans.9.9: na cha mA.n tAni karmANi nibadhnanti dhana~njaya | udAsInavadAsInamasakta.n teShu karmasu
raw_itrans.9.10: mayAdhyakSheNa prakR^itiH sUyate sacharAcharam | hetunAnena kaunteya jagadviparivartate
raw_itrans.9.11: avajAnanti mAM mUDhA mAnuShI.n tanumAshritam | paraM bhAvamajAnanto mama bhUtamaheshvaram
raw_itrans.9.12: moghAshA moghakarmANo moghaj~nAnA vichetasaH | rAkShasImAsurI.n chaiva prakR^itiM mohinI.n shritAH
raw_itrans.9.13: mahAtmAnastu mAM pArtha daivIM prakR^itimAshritAH | bhajantyananyamanaso j~nAtvA bhUtAdimavyayam
raw_itrans.9.14: satataM kIrtayanto mA.n yatantashcha dR^iDhavratAH | namasyantashcha mAM bhaktyA nityayuktA upAsate
raw_itrans.9.15: j~nAnayaj~nena chApyanye yajanto mAmupAsate | ekatvena pR^ithaktvena bahudhA vishvatomukham
raw_itrans.9.16: ahaM kraturahaM yaj~naH svadhAhamahamauShadham | mantro.ahamahamevAjyamahamagnirahaM hutam
raw_itrans.9.17: pitAhamasya jagato mAtA dhAtA pitAmahaH | vedyaM pavitramo~NkAra R^iksAma yajureva cha
raw_itrans.9.18: gatirbhartA prabhuH sAkShI nivAsaH sharaNa.n suhR^it | prabhavaH pralayaH sthAnaM nidhAnaM bIjamavyayam
raw_itrans.9.19: tapAmyahamahaM varSha.n nigR^ihNAmyutsR^ijAmi cha | amR^ita.n chaiva mR^ityushcha sadasachchAhamarjuna
raw_itrans.9.20: traividyA mA.n somapAH pUtapApA yaj~nairiShTvA svargatiM prArthayante | te puNyamAsAdya surendraloka\- mashnanti divyAndivi devabhogAn
raw_itrans.9.21: te taM bhuktvA svargalokaM vishAlaM kShINe puNye martyalokaM vishanti | evaM trayIdharmamanuprapannA gatAgataM kAmakAmA labhante
raw_itrans.9.22: ananyAshchintayanto mA.n ye janAH paryupAsate | teShA.n nityAbhiyuktAnA.n yogakShemaM vahAmyaham
raw_itrans.9.23: ye.apyanyadevatA bhaktA yajante shraddhayAnvitAH | te.api mAmeva kaunteya yajantyavidhipUrvakam
raw_itrans.9.24: ahaM hi sarvayaj~nAnAM bhoktA cha prabhureva cha | na tu mAmabhijAnanti tattvenAtashchyavanti te
raw_itrans.9.25: yAnti devavratA devAnpitR^InyAnti pitR^ivratAH | bhUtAni yAnti bhUtejyA yAnti madyAjino.api mAm
raw_itrans.9.26: patraM puShpaM phalaM toyaM yo me bhaktyA prayachChati | tadahaM bhaktyupahR^itamashnAmi prayatAtmanaH
raw_itrans.9.27: yatkaroShi yadashnAsi yajjuhoShi dadAsi yat | yattapasyasi kaunteya tatkuruShva madarpaNam
raw_itrans.9.28: shubhAshubhaphalairevaM mokShyase karmabandhanaiH | sa.nnyAsayogayuktAtmA vimukto mAmupaiShyasi
raw_itrans.9.29: samo.ahaM sarvabhUteShu na me dveShyo.asti na priyaH | ye bhajanti tu mAM bhaktyA mayi te teShu chApyaham
raw_itrans.9.30: api chetsudurAchAro bhajate mAmananyabhAk | sAdhureva sa mantavyaH samyagvyavasito hi saH
raw_itrans.9.31: kShipraM bhavati dharmAtmA shashvachChAnti.n nigachChati | kaunteya pratijAnIhi na me bhaktaH praNashyati
raw_itrans.9.32: mA.n hi pArtha vyapAshritya ye.api syuH pApayonayaH | striyo vaishyAstathA shUdrAste.api yAnti parAM gatim
raw_itrans.9.33: kiM punarbrAhmaNAH puNyA bhaktA rAjarShayastathA | anityamasukhaM lokamimaM prApya bhajasva mAm
raw_itrans.9.34: manmanA bhava madbhakto madyAjI mA.n namaskuru | mAmevaiShyasi yuktvaivamAtmAnaM matparAyaNaH
raw_itrans.10.1: OM tatsaditi shrImadbhagavadgItAsUpaniShatsu brahmavidyAyA.n yogashAstre shrIkR^iShNArjunasa.nvAde rAjavidyArAjaguhyayogo nAma navamo.adhyAyaH || 9|| shrIbhagavAnuvAcha | bhUya eva mahAbAho shR^iNu me paramaM vachaH | yatte.ahaM prIyamANAya vakShyAmi hitakAmyayA
raw_itrans.10.2: na me viduH suragaNAH prabhavaM na maharShayaH | ahamAdirhi devAnAM maharShINA.n cha sarvashaH
raw_itrans.10.3: yo mAmajamanAdi.n cha vetti lokamaheshvaram | asammUDhaH sa martyeShu sarvapApaiH pramuchyate
raw_itrans.10.4: buddhirj~nAnamasammohaH kShamA satya.n damaH shamaH | sukhaM duHkhaM bhavo.abhAvo bhaya.n chAbhayameva cha
raw_itrans.10.5: ahi.nsA samatA tuShTistapo dAnaM yasho.ayashaH | bhavanti bhAvA bhUtAnAM matta eva pR^ithagvidhAH
raw_itrans.10.6: maharShayaH sapta pUrve chatvAro manavastathA | madbhAvA mAnasA jAtA yeShA.n loka imAH prajAH
raw_itrans.10.7: etA.n vibhUti.n yoga.n cha mama yo vetti tattvataH | so.avikampena yogena yujyate nAtra sa.nshayaH
raw_itrans.10.8: ahaM sarvasya prabhavo mattaH sarvaM pravartate | iti matvA bhajante mAM budhA bhAvasamanvitAH
raw_itrans.10.9: machchittA madgataprANA bodhayantaH parasparam | kathayantashcha mA.n nitya.n tuShyanti cha ramanti cha
raw_itrans.10.10: teShA.n satatayuktAnAM bhajatAM prItipUrvakam | dadAmi buddhiyogaM taM yena mAmupayAnti te
raw_itrans.10.12: arjuna uvAcha | paraM brahma paraM dhAma pavitraM paramaM bhavAn | puruShaM shAshvataM divyamAdidevamajaM vibhum
raw_itrans.10.13: AhustvAmR^iShayaH sarve devarShirnAradastathA | asito devalo vyAsaH svaya.n chaiva bravIShi me
raw_itrans.10.14: sarvametadR^itaM manye yanmA.n vadasi keshava | na hi te bhagavanvyakti.n vidurdevA na dAnavAH
raw_itrans.10.15: svayamevAtmanAtmAnaM vettha tvaM puruShottama | bhUtabhAvana bhUtesha devadeva jagatpate
raw_itrans.10.16: vaktumarhasyasheSheNa divyA hyAtmavibhUtayaH | yAbhirvibhUtibhirlokAnimA.nstva.n vyApya tiShThasi
raw_itrans.10.17: kathaM vidyAmahaM yogi.nstvA.n sadA parichintayan | keShu keShu cha bhAveShu chintyo.asi bhagavanmayA
raw_itrans.10.18: vistareNAtmano yogaM vibhUti.n cha janArdana | bhUyaH kathaya tR^iptirhi shR^iNvato nAsti me.amR^itam
raw_itrans.10.19: shrIbhagavAnuvAcha | hanta te kathayiShyAmi divyA hyAtmavibhUtayaH | prAdhAnyataH kurushreShTha nAstyanto vistarasya me
raw_itrans.10.20: ahamAtmA guDAkesha sarvabhUtAshayasthitaH | ahamAdishcha madhya.n cha bhUtAnAmanta eva cha
raw_itrans.10.21: AdityAnAmahaM viShNurjyotiShA.n ravira.nshumAn | marIchirmarutAmasmi nakShatrANAmahaM shashI
raw_itrans.10.22: vedAnA.n sAmavedo.asmi devAnAmasmi vAsavaH | indriyANAM manashchAsmi bhUtAnAmasmi chetanA
raw_itrans.10.23: rudrANA.n sha~NkarashchAsmi vittesho yakSharakShasAm | vasUnAM pAvakashchAsmi meruH shikhariNAmaham
raw_itrans.10.24: purodhasA.n cha mukhyaM mA.n viddhi pArtha bR^ihaspatim | senAnInAmahaM skandaH sarasAmasmi sAgaraH
raw_itrans.10.25: maharShINAM bhR^igurahaM girAmasmyekamakSharam | yaj~nAnA.n japayaj~no.asmi sthAvarANA.n himAlayaH
raw_itrans.10.26: ashvatthaH sarvavR^ikShANA.n devarShINA.n cha nAradaH | gandharvANA.n chitrarathaH siddhAnA.n kapilo muniH
raw_itrans.10.27: uchchaiHshravasamashvAnA.n viddhi mAmamR^itodbhavam | airAvataM gajendrANA.n narANA.n cha narAdhipam
raw_itrans.10.28: AyudhAnAmahaM vajra.n dhenUnAmasmi kAmadhuk | prajanashchAsmi kandarpaH sarpANAmasmi vAsukiH
raw_itrans.10.29: anantashchAsmi nAgAnA.n varuNo yAdasAmaham | pitR^INAmaryamA chAsmi yamaH sa.nyamatAmaham
raw_itrans.10.30: prahlAdashchAsmi daityAnA.n kAlaH kalayatAmaham | mR^igANA.n cha mR^igendro.ahaM vainateyashcha pakShiNAm
raw_itrans.10.31: pavanaH pavatAmasmi rAmaH shastrabhR^itAmaham | jhaShANAM makarashchAsmi srotasAmasmi jAhnavI
raw_itrans.10.32: sargANAmAdirantashcha madhya.n chaivAhamarjuna | adhyAtmavidyA vidyAnA.n vAdaH pravadatAmaham
raw_itrans.10.33: akSharANAmakAro.asmi dvandvaH sAmAsikasya cha | ahamevAkShayaH kAlo dhAtAhaM vishvatomukhaH
raw_itrans.10.34: mR^ityuH sarvaharashchAhamudbhavashcha bhaviShyatAm | kIrtiH shrIrvAkcha nArINA.n smR^itirmedhA dhR^itiH kShamA
raw_itrans.10.35: bR^ihatsAma tathA sAmnA.n gAyatrI ChandasAmaham | mAsAnAM mArgashIrSho.ahamR^itUnA.n kusumAkaraH
raw_itrans.10.36: dyUta.n ChalayatAmasmi tejastejasvinAmaham | jayo.asmi vyavasAyo.asmi sattvaM sattvavatAmaham
raw_itrans.10.37: vR^iShNInA.n vAsudevo.asmi pANDavAnA.n dhana~njayaH | munInAmapyahaM vyAsaH kavInAmushanA kaviH
raw_itrans.10.38: daNDo damayatAmasmi nItirasmi jigIShatAm | mauna.n chaivAsmi guhyAnA.n j~nAnaM j~nAnavatAmaham
raw_itrans.10.39: yachchApi sarvabhUtAnAM bIjaM tadahamarjuna | na tadasti vinA yatsyAnmayA bhUta.n charAcharam
raw_itrans.10.40: nAnto.asti mama divyAnA.n vibhUtInAM parantapa | eSha tUddeshataH prokto vibhUtervistaro mayA
raw_itrans.10.41: yadyadvibhUtimatsattvaM shrImadUrjitameva vA | tattadevAvagachCha tvaM mama tejo.n.ashasambhavam
raw_itrans.10.42: athavA bahunaitena kiM j~nAtena tavArjuna | viShTabhyAhamidaM kR^itsnamekA.nshena sthito jagat
raw_itrans.11.1: OM tatsaditi shrImadbhagavadgItAsUpaniShatsu brahmavidyAyA.n yogashAstre shrIkR^iShNArjunasa.nvAde vibhUtiyogo nAma dashamo.adhyAyaH || 10|| arjuna uvAcha | madanugrahAya paramaM guhyamadhyAtmasa.nj~nitam | yattvayokta.n vachastena moho.ayaM vigato mama
raw_itrans.11.2: bhavApyayau hi bhUtAnA.n shrutau vistarasho mayA | tvattaH kamalapatrAkSha mAhAtmyamapi chAvyayam
raw_itrans.11.3: evametadyathAttha tvamAtmAnaM parameshvara | draShTumichChAmi te rUpamaishvaraM puruShottama
raw_itrans.11.4: manyase yadi tachChakyaM mayA draShTumiti prabho | yogeshvara tato me tva.n darshayAtmAnamavyayam
raw_itrans.11.5: shrIbhagavAnuvAcha | pashya me pArtha rUpANi shatasho.atha sahasrashaH | nAnAvidhAni divyAni nAnAvarNAkR^itIni cha
raw_itrans.11.7: ihaikastha.n jagatkR^itsnaM pashyAdya sacharAcharam | mama dehe guDAkesha yachchAnyad draShTumichChasi
raw_itrans.11.8: na tu mA.n shakyase draShTumanenaiva svachakShuShA | divya.n dadAmi te chakShuH pashya me yogamaishvaram
raw_itrans.11.9: sa~njaya uvAcha | evamuktvA tato rAjanmahAyogeshvaro hariH | darshayAmAsa pArthAya paramaM rUpamaishvaram
raw_itrans.11.12: divi sUryasahasrasya bhavedyugapadutthitA | yadi bhAH sadR^ishI sA syAdbhAsastasya mahAtmanaH
raw_itrans.11.13: tatraikastha.n jagatkR^itsnaM pravibhaktamanekadhA | apashyaddevadevasya sharIre pANDavastadA
raw_itrans.11.14: tataH sa vismayAviShTo hR^iShTaromA dhana~njayaH | praNamya shirasA devaM kR^itA~njalirabhAShata
raw_itrans.11.15: arjuna uvAcha | pashyAmi devA.nstava deva dehe sarvA.nstathA bhUtavisheShasa~NghAn | brahmANamIshaM kamalAsanastha\- mR^iShI.nshcha sarvAnuragA.nshcha divyAn
raw_itrans.11.16: anekabAhUdaravaktranetra.n pashyAmi tvA.n sarvato.anantarUpam | nAntaM na madhyaM na punastavAdi.n pashyAmi vishveshvara  vishvarUpa
raw_itrans.11.17: kirITinaM gadina.n chakriNa.n cha tejorAshi.n sarvato dIptimantam | pashyAmi tvA.n durnirIkShya.n samantAd.h dIptAnalArkadyutimaprameyam
raw_itrans.11.18: tvamakSharaM paramaM veditavya.n tvamasya vishvasya paraM nidhAnam | tvamavyayaH shAshvatadharmagoptA sanAtanastvaM puruSho mato me
raw_itrans.11.19: anAdimadhyAntamanantavIrya\- manantabAhu.n shashisUryanetram | pashyAmi tvA.n dIptahutAshavaktra.n svatejasA vishvamidaM tapantam
raw_itrans.11.20: dyAvApR^ithivyoridamantara.n hi vyApta.n tvayaikena dishashcha sarvAH | dR^iShTvAd.hbhutaM rUpamugra.n tavedaM lokatrayaM pravyathitaM mahAtman
raw_itrans.11.21: amI hi tvA.n surasa~NghA vishanti kechidbhItAH prA~njalayo gR^iNanti | svastItyuktvA maharShisiddhasa~NghAH stuvanti tvA.n stutibhiH puShkalAbhiH
raw_itrans.11.22: rudrAdityA vasavo ye cha sAdhyA vishve.ashvinau marutashchoShmapAshcha | gandharvayakShAsurasiddhasa~NghA vIkShante tvA.n vismitAshchaiva sarve
raw_itrans.11.23: rUpaM mahatte bahuvaktranetra.n mahAbAho bahubAhUrupAdam | bahUdaraM bahuda.nShTrAkarAlaM dR^iShTvA lokAH pravyathitAstathAham
raw_itrans.11.24: nabhaHspR^ishaM dIptamanekavarNa.n vyAttAnanaM dIptavishAlanetram | dR^iShTvA hi tvAM pravyathitAntarAtmA dhR^iti.n na vindAmi shama.n cha viShNo
raw_itrans.11.25: da.nShTrAkarAlAni cha te mukhAni dR^iShTvaiva kAlAnalasannibhAni | disho na jAne na labhe cha sharma prasIda devesha jagannivAsa
raw_itrans.11.26: amI cha tvA.n dhR^itarAShTrasya putrAH sarve sahaivAvanipAlasa~NghaiH | bhIShmo droNaH sUtaputrastathAsau sahAsmadIyairapi yodhamukhyaiH
raw_itrans.11.27: vaktrANi te tvaramANA vishanti da.nShTrAkarAlAni bhayAnakAni | kechidvilagnA dashanAntareShu sandR^ishyante chUrNitairuttamA~NgaiH
raw_itrans.11.28: yathA nadInAM bahavo.ambuvegAH samudramevAbhimukhA dravanti | tathA tavAmI naralokavIrA vishanti vaktrANyabhivijvalanti
raw_itrans.11.29: yathA pradIpta.n jvalanaM pata~NgA vishanti nAshAya samR^iddhavegAH | tathaiva nAshAya vishanti lokA\- stavApi vaktrANi samR^iddhavegAH
raw_itrans.11.30: lelihyase grasamAnaH samantAl.h\- lokAnsamagrAnvadanairjvaladbhiH | tejobhirApUrya jagatsamagra.n bhAsastavogrAH pratapanti viShNo
raw_itrans.11.31: AkhyAhi me ko bhavAnugrarUpo namo.astu te devavara prasIda | vij~nAtumichChAmi bhavantamAdya.n na hi prajAnAmi tava pravR^ittim
raw_itrans.11.32: shrIbhagavAnuvAcha | kAlo.asmi lokakShayakR^itpravR^iddho lokAnsamAhartumiha pravR^ittaH | R^ite.api tvA.n na bhaviShyanti sarve ye.avasthitAH pratyanIkeShu yodhAH
raw_itrans.11.33: tasmAttvamuttiShTha yasho labhasva jitvA shatrUn bhu~N.hkShva rAjya.n samR^iddham | mayaivaite nihatAH pUrvameva nimittamAtraM bhava savyasAchin
raw_itrans.11.34: droNa.n cha bhIShma.n cha jayadratha.n cha karNa.n tathAnyAnapi yodhavIrAn | mayA hatA.nstva.n jahi mA vyathiShThA yudhyasva jetAsi raNe sapatnAn
raw_itrans.11.35: sa~njaya uvAcha | etachChrutvA vachanaM keshavasya kR^itA~njalirvepamAnaH kirITI | namaskR^itvA bhUya evAha kR^iShNaM sagadgadaM bhItabhItaH praNamya
raw_itrans.11.36: arjuna uvAcha | sthAne hR^iShIkesha tava prakIrtyA jagatprahR^iShyatyanurajyate cha | rakShA.nsi bhItAni disho dravanti sarve namasyanti cha siddhasa~NghAH
raw_itrans.11.37: kasmAchcha te na nameranmahAtman.h garIyase brahmaNo.apyAdikartre | ananta devesha jagannivAsa tvamakSharaM sadasattatparaM yat
raw_itrans.11.38: tvamAdidevaH puruShaH purANa\- stvamasya vishvasya paraM nidhAnam | vettAsi vedya.n cha para.n cha dhAma tvayA tataM vishvamanantarUpa
raw_itrans.11.39: vAyuryamo.agnirvaruNaH shashA~NkaH prajApatistvaM prapitAmahashcha | namo namaste.astu sahasrakR^itvaH punashcha bhUyo.api namo namaste
raw_itrans.11.40: namaH purastAdatha pR^iShThataste namo.astu te sarvata eva sarva | anantavIryAmitavikramastva.n sarva.n samApnoShi tato.asi sarvaH
raw_itrans.11.41: sakheti matvA prasabhaM yaduktaM he kR^iShNa he yAdava he sakheti | ajAnatA mahimAnaM tavedaM mayA pramAdAtpraNayena vApi
raw_itrans.11.42: yachchAvahAsArthamasatkR^ito.asi vihArashayyAsanabhojaneShu | eko.athavApyachyuta tatsamakSha.n tatkShAmaye tvAmahamaprameyam
raw_itrans.11.43: pitAsi lokasya charAcharasya tvamasya pUjyashcha gururgarIyAn | na tvatsamo.astyabhyadhikaH kuto.anyo lokatraye.apyapratimaprabhAva
raw_itrans.11.44: tasmAtpraNamya praNidhAya kAyaM prasAdaye tvAmahamIshamIDyam | piteva putrasya sakheva sakhyuH priyaH priyAyArhasi deva soDhum
raw_itrans.11.45: adR^iShTapUrva.n hR^iShito.asmi dR^iShTvA bhayena cha pravyathitaM mano me | tadeva me darshaya deva rUpaM prasIda devesha jagannivAsa
raw_itrans.11.46: kirITinaM gadina.n chakrahastaM ichChAmi tvA.n draShTumahaM tathaiva | tenaiva rUpeNa chaturbhujena sahasrabAho bhava vishvamUrte
raw_itrans.11.47: shrIbhagavAnuvAcha | mayA prasannena tavArjunedaM rUpaM paraM darshitamAtmayogAt | tejomayaM vishvamanantamAdya.n yanme tvadanyena na dR^iShTapUrvam
raw_itrans.11.48: na vedayaj~nAdhyayanairna dAnai\- rna cha kriyAbhirna tapobhirugraiH | eva.nrUpaH shakya ahaM nR^iloke draShTuM tvadanyena kurupravIra
raw_itrans.11.49: mA te vyathA mA cha vimUDhabhAvo dR^iShTvA rUpaM ghoramIdR^i~N.hmamedam | vyapetabhIH prItamanAH punastva.n tadeva me rUpamidaM prapashya
raw_itrans.11.50: sa~njaya uvAcha | ityarjunaM vAsudevastathoktvA svakaM rUpaM darshayAmAsa bhUyaH | AshvAsayAmAsa cha bhItamenaM bhUtvA punaH saumyavapurmahAtmA
raw_itrans.11.51: arjuna uvAcha | dR^iShTvedaM mAnuShaM rUpaM tava saumya.n janArdana | idAnImasmi sa.nvR^ittaH sachetAH prakR^iti.n gataH
raw_itrans.11.52: shrIbhagavAnuvAcha | sudurdarshamidaM rUpaM dR^iShTavAnasi yanmama | devA apyasya rUpasya nitya.n darshanakA~NkShiNaH
raw_itrans.11.53: nAhaM vedairna tapasA na dAnena na chejyayA | shakya eva.nvidho draShTuM dR^iShTavAnasi mA.n yathA
raw_itrans.11.54: bhaktyA tvananyayA shakya ahameva.nvidho.arjuna | j~nAtuM draShTu.n cha tattvena praveShTu.n cha parantapa
raw_itrans.11.55: matkarmakR^inmatparamo madbhaktaH sa~NgavarjitaH | nirvairaH sarvabhUteShu yaH sa mAmeti pANDava
raw_itrans.12.1: OM tatsaditi shrImadbhagavadgItAsUpaniShatsu brahmavidyAyA.n yogashAstre shrIkR^iShNArjunasa.nvAde vishvarUpadarshanayogo nAmaikAdasho.adhyAyaH || 11|| arjuna uvAcha | evaM satatayuktA ye bhaktAstvAM paryupAsate | ye chApyakSharamavyaktaM teShA.n ke yogavittamAH
raw_itrans.12.2: shrIbhagavAnuvAcha | mayyAveshya mano ye mAM nityayuktA upAsate | shraddhayA parayopetAH te me yuktatamA matAH
raw_itrans.12.4: sanniyamyendriyagrAmaM sarvatra samabuddhayaH | te prApnuvanti mAmeva sarvabhUtahite ratAH
raw_itrans.12.6: ye tu sarvANi karmANi mayi sa.nnyasya matparAH | ananyenaiva yogena mA.n dhyAyanta upAsate
raw_itrans.12.7: teShAmahaM samuddhartA mR^ityusa.nsArasAgarAt | bhavAmi nachirAtpArtha mayyAveshitachetasAm
raw_itrans.12.8: mayyeva mana Adhatsva mayi buddhi.n niveshaya | nivasiShyasi mayyeva ata Urdhva.n na sa.nshayaH
raw_itrans.12.9: atha chittaM samAdhAtuM na shaknoShi mayi sthiram | abhyAsayogena tato mAmichChAptuM dhana~njaya
raw_itrans.12.10: abhyAse.apyasamartho.asi matkarmaparamo bhava | madarthamapi karmANi kurvansiddhimavApsyasi
raw_itrans.12.11: athaitadapyashakto.asi kartuM madyogamAshritaH | sarvakarmaphalatyAgaM tataH kuru yatAtmavAn
raw_itrans.12.13: adveShTA sarvabhUtAnAM maitraH karuNa eva cha | nirmamo niraha~NkAraH samaduHkhasukhaH kShamI
raw_itrans.12.14: santuShTaH satataM yogI yatAtmA dR^iDhanishchayaH | mayyarpitamanobuddhiryo madbhaktaH sa me priyaH
raw_itrans.12.15: yasmAnnodvijate loko lokAnnodvijate cha yaH | harShAmarShabhayodvegairmukto yaH sa cha me priyaH
raw_itrans.12.16: anapekShaH shuchirdakSha udAsIno gatavyathaH | sarvArambhaparityAgI yo madbhaktaH sa me priyaH
raw_itrans.12.17: yo na hR^iShyati na dveShTi na shochati na kA~NkShati | shubhAshubhaparityAgI bhaktimAnyaH sa me priyaH
raw_itrans.12.18: samaH shatrau cha mitre cha tathA mAnApamAnayoH | shItoShNasukhaduHkheShu samaH sa~NgavivarjitaH
raw_itrans.12.19: tulyanindAstutirmaunI santuShTo yena kenachit | aniketaH sthiramatirbhaktimAnme priyo naraH
raw_itrans.12.20: ye tu dharmyAmR^itamidaM yathoktaM paryupAsate | shraddadhAnA matparamA bhaktAste.atIva me priyAH
raw_itrans.13.1: OM tatsaditi shrImadbhagavadgItAsUpaniShatsu brahmavidyAyA.n yogashAstre shrIkR^iShNArjunasa.nvAde bhaktiyogo nAma dvAdasho.adhyAyaH || 12|| arjuna uvAcha | prakR^itiM puruSha.n chaiva kShetra.n kShetraj~nameva cha | etadveditumichChAmi j~nAnaM j~neya.n cha keshava
raw_itrans.13.2: shrIbhagavAnuvAcha | idaM sharIraM kaunteya kShetramityabhidhIyate | etadyo vetti taM prAhuH kShetraj~na iti tadvidaH
raw_itrans.13.3: kShetraj~na.n chApi mAM viddhi sarvakShetreShu bhArata | kShetrakShetraj~nayorj~nAnaM yattajj~nAnaM mataM mama
raw_itrans.13.4: tatkShetra.n yachcha yAdR^ikcha yadvikAri yatashcha yat | sa cha yo yatprabhAvashcha tatsamAsena me shR^iNu
raw_itrans.13.5: R^iShibhirbahudhA gIta.n ChandobhirvividhaiH pR^ithak | brahmasUtrapadaishchaiva hetumadbhirvinishchitaiH
raw_itrans.13.6: mahAbhUtAnyaha~NkAro buddhiravyaktameva cha | indriyANi dashaika.n cha pa~ncha chendriyagocharAH
raw_itrans.13.7: ichChA dveShaH sukhaM duHkhaM sa~NghAtashchetanA dhR^itiH | etatkShetra.n samAsena savikAramudAhR^itam
raw_itrans.13.13: j~neyaM yattatpravakShyAmi yajj~nAtvAmR^itamashnute | anAdimatparaM brahma na sattannAsaduchyate
raw_itrans.13.14: sarvataH pANipAdaM tatsarvato.akShishiromukham | sarvataH shrutimalloke sarvamAvR^itya tiShThati
raw_itrans.13.15: sarvendriyaguNAbhAsaM sarvendriyavivarjitam | asakta.n sarvabhR^ichchaiva nirguNaM guNabhoktR^i cha
raw_itrans.13.16: bahirantashcha bhUtAnAmachara.n charameva cha | sUkShmatvAttadavij~neyaM dUrastha.n chAntike cha tat
raw_itrans.13.17: avibhakta.n cha bhUteShu vibhaktamiva cha sthitam | bhUtabhartR^i cha tajj~neyaM grasiShNu prabhaviShNu cha
raw_itrans.13.18: jyotiShAmapi tajjyotistamasaH paramuchyate | j~nAnaM j~neyaM j~nAnagamya.n hR^idi sarvasya viShThitam
raw_itrans.13.19: iti kShetra.n tathA j~nAnaM j~neya.n chokta.n samAsataH | madbhakta etadvij~nAya madbhAvAyopapadyate
raw_itrans.13.20: prakR^itiM puruSha.n chaiva vid.hdhyanAdI ubhAvapi | vikArA.nshcha guNA.nshchaiva viddhi prakR^itisambhavAn
raw_itrans.13.21: kAryakAraNakartR^itve hetuH prakR^itiruchyate | puruShaH sukhaduHkhAnAM bhoktR^itve heturuchyate
raw_itrans.13.22: puruShaH prakR^itistho hi bhu~N.hkte prakR^itijAnguNAn | kAraNaM guNasa~Ngo.asya sadasadyonijanmasu
raw_itrans.13.23: upadraShTAnumantA cha bhartA bhoktA maheshvaraH | paramAtmeti chApyukto dehe.asminpuruShaH paraH
raw_itrans.13.24: ya evaM vetti puruShaM prakR^iti.n cha guNaiH saha | sarvathA vartamAno.api na sa bhUyo.abhijAyate
raw_itrans.13.25: dhyAnenAtmani pashyanti kechidAtmAnamAtmanA | anye sA~Nkhyena yogena karmayogena chApare
raw_itrans.13.26: anye tvevamajAnantaH shrutvAnyebhya upAsate | te.api chAtitarantyeva mR^ityu.n shrutiparAyaNAH
raw_itrans.13.28: samaM sarveShu bhUteShu tiShThantaM parameshvaram | vinashyatsvavinashyanta.n yaH pashyati sa pashyati
raw_itrans.13.29: samaM pashyanhi sarvatra samavasthitamIshvaram | na hinastyAtmanAtmAnaM tato yAti parAM gatim
raw_itrans.13.30: prakR^ityaiva cha karmANi kriyamANAni sarvashaH | yaH pashyati tathAtmAnamakartAraM sa pashyati
raw_itrans.13.31: yadA bhUtapR^ithagbhAvamekasthamanupashyati | tata eva cha vistAraM brahma sampadyate tadA
raw_itrans.13.32: anAditvAnnirguNatvAtparamAtmAyamavyayaH | sharIrastho.api kaunteya na karoti na lipyate
raw_itrans.13.33: yathA sarvagataM saukShmyAdAkAshaM nopalipyate | sarvatrAvasthito dehe tathAtmA nopalipyate
raw_itrans.13.34: yathA prakAshayatyekaH kR^itsna.n lokamimaM raviH | kShetra.n kShetrI tathA kR^itsnaM prakAshayati bhArata
raw_itrans.13.35: kShetrakShetraj~nayorevamantaraM j~nAnachakShuShA | bhUtaprakR^itimokSha.n cha ye viduryAnti te param
raw_itrans.14.1: OM tatsaditi shrImadbhagavadgItAsUpaniShatsu brahmavidyAyA.n yogashAstre shrIkR^iShNArjunasa.nvAde kShetrakShetraj~navibhAgayogo nAma trayodasho.adhyAyaH || 13|| shrIbhagavAnuvAcha | paraM bhUyaH pravakShyAmi j~nAnAnA.n j~nAnamuttamam | yajj~nAtvA munayaH sarve parAM siddhimito gatAH
raw_itrans.14.2: idaM j~nAnamupAshritya mama sAdharmyamAgatAH | sarge.api nopajAyante pralaye na vyathanti cha
raw_itrans.14.3: mama yonirmahad brahma tasmingarbha.n dadhAmyaham | sambhavaH sarvabhUtAnA.n tato bhavati bhArata
raw_itrans.14.4: sarvayoniShu kaunteya mUrtayaH sambhavanti yAH | tAsAM brahma mahadyonirahaM bIjapradaH pitA
raw_itrans.14.5: sattvaM rajastama iti guNAH prakR^itisambhavAH | nibadhnanti mahAbAho dehe dehinamavyayam
raw_itrans.14.6: tatra sattvaM nirmalatvAtprakAshakamanAmayam | sukhasa~Ngena badhnAti j~nAnasa~Ngena chAnagha
raw_itrans.14.7: rajo rAgAtmakaM viddhi tR^iShNAsa~Ngasamudbhavam | tannibadhnAti kaunteya karmasa~Ngena dehinam
raw_itrans.14.8: tamastvaj~nAnajaM viddhi mohanaM sarvadehinAm | pramAdAlasyanidrAbhistannibadhnAti bhArata
raw_itrans.14.9: sattvaM sukhe sa~njayati rajaH karmaNi bhArata | j~nAnamAvR^itya tu tamaH pramAde sa~njayatyuta
raw_itrans.14.10: rajastamashchAbhibhUya sattvaM bhavati bhArata | rajaH sattvaM tamashchaiva tamaH sattvaM rajastathA
raw_itrans.14.11: sarvadvAreShu dehe.asminprakAsha upajAyate | j~nAnaM yadA tadA vidyAdvivR^iddha.n sattvamityuta
raw_itrans.14.12: lobhaH pravR^ittirArambhaH karmaNAmashamaH spR^ihA | rajasyetAni jAyante vivR^iddhe bharatarShabha
raw_itrans.14.13: aprakAsho.apravR^ittishcha pramAdo moha eva cha | tamasyetAni jAyante vivR^iddhe kurunandana
raw_itrans.14.14: yadA sattve pravR^iddhe tu pralayaM yAti dehabhR^it | tadottamavidA.n lokAnamalAnpratipadyate
raw_itrans.14.15: rajasi pralayaM gatvA karmasa~NgiShu jAyate | tathA pralInastamasi mUDhayoniShu jAyate
raw_itrans.14.16: karmaNaH sukR^itasyAhuH sAttvikaM nirmalaM phalam | rajasastu phalaM duHkhamaj~nAnaM tamasaH phalam
raw_itrans.14.17: sattvAtsa~njAyate j~nAnaM rajaso lobha eva cha | pramAdamohau tamaso bhavato.aj~nAnameva cha
raw_itrans.14.18: Urdhva.n gachChanti sattvasthA madhye tiShThanti rAjasAH | jaghanyaguNavR^ittisthA adho gachChanti tAmasAH
raw_itrans.14.19: nAnya.n guNebhyaH kartAraM yadA draShTAnupashyati | guNebhyashcha paraM vetti madbhAvaM so.adhigachChati
raw_itrans.14.21: arjuna uvAcha | kairli~NgaistrInguNAnetAnatIto bhavati prabho | kimAchAraH katha.n chaitA.nstrInguNAnativartate
raw_itrans.14.22: shrIbhagavAnuvAcha | prakAsha.n cha pravR^itti.n cha mohameva cha pANDava | na dveShTi sampravR^ittAni na nivR^ittAni kA~NkShati
raw_itrans.14.23: udAsInavadAsIno guNairyo na vichAlyate | guNA vartanta ityevaM yo.avatiShThati ne~Ngate
raw_itrans.14.25: mAnApamAnayostulyastulyo mitrAripakShayoH | sarvArambhaparityAgI guNAtItaH sa uchyate
raw_itrans.14.26: mA.n cha yo.avyabhichAreNa bhaktiyogena sevate | sa guNAnsamatItyaitAnbrahmabhUyAya kalpate
raw_itrans.14.27: brahmaNo hi pratiShThAhamamR^itasyAvyayasya cha | shAshvatasya cha dharmasya sukhasyaikAntikasya cha
raw_itrans.15.1: OM tatsaditi shrImadbhagavadgItAsUpaniShatsu brahmavidyAyA.n yogashAstre shrIkR^iShNArjunasa.nvAde guNatrayavibhAgayogo nAma chaturdasho.adhyAyaH || 14|| shrIbhagavAnuvAcha | UrdhvamUlamadhaHshAkhamashvatthaM prAhuravyayam | ChandA.nsi yasya parNAni yasta.n veda sa vedavit
raw_itrans.15.2: adhashchordhvaM prasR^itAstasya shAkhA guNapravR^iddhA viShayapravAlAH | adhashcha mUlAnyanusantatAni karmAnubandhIni manuShyaloke
raw_itrans.15.3: na rUpamasyeha tathopalabhyate nAnto na chAdirna cha sampratiShThA | ashvatthamenaM suvirUDhamUlaM asa~NgashastreNa dR^iDhena ChittvA
raw_itrans.15.4: tataH padaM tatparimArgitavyaM yasmingatA na nivartanti bhUyaH | tameva chAdyaM puruShaM prapadye | yataH pravR^ittiH prasR^itA purANI
raw_itrans.15.5: nirmAnamohA jitasa~NgadoShA adhyAtmanityA vinivR^ittakAmAH | dvandvairvimuktAH sukhaduHkhasa.nj~nai\- rgachChantyamUDhAH padamavyayaM tat
raw_itrans.15.6: na tadbhAsayate sUryo na shashA~Nko na pAvakaH | yadgatvA na nivartante taddhAma paramaM mama
raw_itrans.15.7: mamaivA.nsho jIvaloke jIvabhUtaH sanAtanaH | manaHShaShThAnIndriyANi prakR^itisthAni karShati
raw_itrans.15.8: sharIra.n yadavApnoti yachchApyutkrAmatIshvaraH | gR^ihItvaitAni sa.nyAti vAyurgandhAnivAshayAt
raw_itrans.15.9: shrotra.n chakShuH sparshana.n cha rasanaM ghrANameva cha | adhiShThAya manashchAyaM viShayAnupasevate
raw_itrans.15.10: utkrAmantaM sthitaM vApi bhu~njAnaM vA guNAnvitam | vimUDhA nAnupashyanti pashyanti j~nAnachakShuShaH
raw_itrans.15.11: yatanto yoginashchainaM pashyantyAtmanyavasthitam | yatanto.apyakR^itAtmAno nainaM pashyantyachetasaH
raw_itrans.15.12: yadAdityagataM tejo jagadbhAsayate.akhilam | yachchandramasi yachchAgnau tattejo viddhi mAmakam
raw_itrans.15.13: gAmAvishya cha bhUtAni dhArayAmyahamojasA | puShNAmi chauShadhIH sarvAH somo bhUtvA rasAtmakaH
raw_itrans.15.14: aha.n vaishvAnaro bhUtvA prANinA.n dehamAshritaH | prANApAnasamAyuktaH pachAmyanna.n chaturvidham
raw_itrans.15.15: sarvasya chAhaM hR^idi sanniviShTo mattaH smR^itirj~nAnamapohana~ncha | vedaishcha sarvairahameva vedyo vedAntakR^idvedavideva chAham
raw_itrans.15.16: dvAvimau puruShau loke kSharashchAkShara eva cha | kSharaH sarvANi bhUtAni kUTastho.akShara uchyate
raw_itrans.15.17: uttamaH puruShastvanyaH paramAtmetyudAhR^itaH | yo lokatrayamAvishya bibhartyavyaya IshvaraH
raw_itrans.15.18: yasmAtkSharamatIto.ahamakSharAdapi chottamaH | ato.asmi loke vede cha prathitaH puruShottamaH
raw_itrans.15.19: yo mAmevamasammUDho jAnAti puruShottamam | sa sarvavidbhajati mAM sarvabhAvena bhArata
raw_itrans.15.20: iti guhyatamaM shAstramidamuktaM mayAnagha | etadbud.hdhvA buddhimAnsyAtkR^itakR^ityashcha bhArata
raw_itrans.16.1: OM tatsaditi shrImadbhagavadgItAsUpaniShatsu brahmavidyAyA.n yogashAstre shrIkR^iShNArjuna sa.nvAde puruShottamayogo nAma pa~nchadasho.adhyAyaH || 15|| shrIbhagavAnuvAcha | abhayaM sattvasa.nshuddhirj~nAnayogavyavasthitiH | dAnaM damashcha yaj~nashcha svAdhyAyastapa Arjavam
raw_itrans.16.2: ahi.nsA satyamakrodhastyAgaH shAntirapaishunam | dayA bhUteShvaloluptvaM mArdavaM hrIrachApalam
raw_itrans.16.3: tejaH kShamA dhR^itiH shauchamadroho nAtimAnitA | bhavanti sampadaM daivImabhijAtasya bhArata
raw_itrans.16.4: dambho darpo.abhimAnashcha krodhaH pAruShyameva cha | aj~nAna.n chAbhijAtasya pArtha sampadamAsurIm
raw_itrans.16.5: daivI sampadvimokShAya nibandhAyAsurI matA | mA shuchaH sampadaM daivImabhijAto.asi pANDava
raw_itrans.16.6: dvau bhUtasargau loke.asmindaiva Asura eva cha | daivo vistarashaH prokta AsuraM pArtha me shR^iNu
raw_itrans.16.7: pravR^itti.n cha nivR^itti.n cha janA na vidurAsurAH | na shauchaM nApi chAchAro na satya.n teShu vidyate
raw_itrans.16.9: etA.n dR^iShTimavaShTabhya naShTAtmAno.alpabuddhayaH | prabhavantyugrakarmANaH kShayAya jagato.ahitAH
raw_itrans.16.11: chintAmaparimeyA.n cha pralayAntAmupAshritAH | kAmopabhogaparamA etAvaditi nishchitAH
raw_itrans.16.13: idamadya mayA labdhamimaM prApsye manoratham | idamastIdamapi me bhaviShyati punardhanam
raw_itrans.16.14: asau mayA hataH shatrurhaniShye chAparAnapi | Ishvaro.ahamahaM bhogI siddho.ahaM balavAnsukhI
raw_itrans.16.15: ADhyo.abhijanavAnasmi ko.anyo.asti sadR^isho mayA | yakShye dAsyAmi modiShya ityaj~nAnavimohitAH
raw_itrans.16.16: anekachittavibhrAntA mohajAlasamAvR^itAH | prasaktAH kAmabhogeShu patanti narake.ashuchau
raw_itrans.16.17: AtmasambhAvitAH stabdhA dhanamAnamadAnvitAH | yajante nAmayaj~naiste dambhenAvidhipUrvakam
raw_itrans.16.18: aha~NkAraM balaM darpa.n kAmaM krodha.n cha sa.nshritAH | mAmAtmaparadeheShu pradviShanto.abhyasUyakAH
raw_itrans.16.19: tAnahaM dviShataH krUrAnsa.nsAreShu narAdhamAn | kShipAmyajasramashubhAnAsurIShveva yoniShu
raw_itrans.16.20: AsurI.n yonimApannA mUDhA janmani janmani | mAmaprApyaiva kaunteya tato yAntyadhamA.n gatim
raw_itrans.16.21: trividhaM narakasyedaM dvAraM nAshanamAtmanaH | kAmaH krodhastathA lobhastasmAdetattrayaM tyajet
raw_itrans.16.22: etairvimuktaH kaunteya tamodvAraistribhirnaraH | AcharatyAtmanaH shreyastato yAti parAM gatim
raw_itrans.16.23: yaH shAstravidhimutsR^ijya vartate kAmakArataH | na sa siddhimavApnoti na sukhaM na parAM gatim
raw_itrans.16.24: tasmAchChAstraM pramANaM te kAryAkAryavyavasthitau | j~nAtvA shAstravidhAnokta.n karma kartumihArhasi
raw_itrans.17.1: OM tatsaditi shrImadbhagavadgItAsUpaniShatsu brahmavidyAyA.n yogashAstre shrIkR^iShNArjunasa.nvAde daivAsurasampadvibhAgayogo nAma ShoDasho.adhyAyaH || 16|| arjuna uvAcha | ye shAstravidhimutsR^ijya yajante shraddhayAnvitAH | teShA.n niShThA tu kA kR^iShNa sattvamAho rajastamaH
raw_itrans.17.2: shrIbhagavAnuvAcha | trividhA bhavati shraddhA dehinA.n sA svabhAvajA | sAttvikI rAjasI chaiva tAmasI cheti tA.n shR^iNu
raw_itrans.17.3: sattvAnurUpA sarvasya shraddhA bhavati bhArata | shraddhAmayo.ayaM puruSho yo yachChraddhaH sa eva saH
raw_itrans.17.4: yajante sAttvikA devAnyakSharakShA.nsi rAjasAH | pretAnbhUtagaNA.nshchAnye yajante tAmasA janAH
raw_itrans.17.5: ashAstravihitaM ghoraM tapyante ye tapo janAH | dambhAha~NkArasa.nyuktAH kAmarAgabalAnvitAH
raw_itrans.17.6: karShayantaH sharIrasthaM bhUtagrAmamachetasaH | mA.n chaivAntaHsharIrastha.n tAnvid.hdhyAsuranishchayAn
raw_itrans.17.7: AhArastvapi sarvasya trividho bhavati priyaH | yaj~nastapastathA dAnaM teShAM bhedamimaM shR^iNu
raw_itrans.17.8: AyuHsattvabalArogyasukhaprItivivardhanAH | rasyAH snigdhAH sthirA hR^idyA AhArAH sAttvikapriyAH
raw_itrans.17.10: yAtayAmaM gatarasaM pUti paryuShita.n cha yat | uchChiShTamapi chAmedhyaM bhojanaM tAmasapriyam
raw_itrans.17.11: aphalAkA~NkShibhiryaj~no vidhidR^iShTo ya ijyate | yaShTavyameveti manaH samAdhAya sa sAttvikaH
raw_itrans.17.12: abhisandhAya tu phalaM dambhArthamapi chaiva yat | ijyate bharatashreShTha taM yaj~na.n viddhi rAjasam
raw_itrans.17.13: vidhihInamasR^iShTAnnaM mantrahInamadakShiNam | shraddhAvirahitaM yaj~na.n tAmasaM parichakShate
raw_itrans.17.14: devadvijaguruprAj~napUjanaM shauchamArjavam | brahmacharyamahi.nsA cha shArIraM tapa uchyate
raw_itrans.17.15: anudvegakaraM vAkya.n satyaM priyahita.n cha yat | svAdhyAyAbhyasana.n chaiva vA~NmayaM tapa uchyate
raw_itrans.17.16: manaH prasAdaH saumyatvaM maunamAtmavinigrahaH | bhAvasa.nshuddhirityetattapo mAnasamuchyate
raw_itrans.17.17: shraddhayA parayA tapta.n tapastattrividhaM naraiH | aphalAkA~NkShibhiryuktaiH sAttvikaM parichakShate
raw_itrans.17.18: satkAramAnapUjArtha.n tapo dambhena chaiva yat | kriyate tadiha prokta.n rAjasa.n chalamadhruvam
raw_itrans.17.19: mUDhagrAheNAtmano yatpIDayA kriyate tapaH | parasyotsAdanArtha.n vA tattAmasamudAhR^itam
raw_itrans.17.20: dAtavyamiti yaddAnaM dIyate.anupakAriNe | deshe kAle cha pAtre cha taddAnaM sAttvikaM smR^itam
raw_itrans.17.21: yattu pratyupakArArthaM phalamuddishya vA punaH | dIyate cha parikliShTa.n taddAnaM rAjasaM smR^itam
raw_itrans.17.23: OMtatsaditi nirdesho brahmaNastrividhaH smR^itaH | brAhmaNAstena vedAshcha yaj~nAshcha vihitAH purA
raw_itrans.17.24: tasmAdomityudAhR^itya yaj~nadAnatapaHkriyAH | pravartante vidhAnoktAH satataM brahmavAdinAm
raw_itrans.17.25: tadityanabhisandhAya phalaM yaj~natapaHkriyAH | dAnakriyAshcha vividhAH kriyante mokShakA~NkShibhiH
raw_itrans.17.26: sadbhAve sAdhubhAve cha sadityetatprayujyate | prashaste karmaNi tathA sachChabdaH pArtha yujyate
raw_itrans.17.27: yaj~ne tapasi dAne cha sthitiH saditi chochyate | karma chaiva tadarthIyaM sadityevAbhidhIyate
raw_itrans.17.28: ashraddhayA hutaM datta.n tapastapta.n kR^ita.n cha yat | asadityuchyate pArtha na cha tatpretya no iha
raw_itrans.18.1: OM tatsaditi shrImadbhagavadgItAsUpaniShatsu brahmavidyAyA.n yogashAstre shrIkR^iShNArjunasa.nvAde shraddhAtrayavibhAgayogo nAma saptadasho.adhyAyaH || 17|| arjuna uvAcha | sa.nnyAsasya mahAbAho tattvamichChAmi veditum | tyAgasya cha hR^iShIkesha pR^ithakkeshiniShUdana
raw_itrans.18.2: shrIbhagavAnuvAcha | kAmyAnA.n karmaNA.n nyAsaM sa.nnyAsaM kavayo viduH | sarvakarmaphalatyAgaM prAhustyAgaM vichakShaNAH
raw_itrans.18.3: tyAjya.n doShavadityeke karma prAhurmanIShiNaH | yaj~nadAnatapaHkarma na tyAjyamiti chApare
raw_itrans.18.4: nishchayaM shR^iNu me tatra tyAge bharatasattama | tyAgo hi puruShavyAghra trividhaH samprakIrtitaH
raw_itrans.18.5: yaj~nadAnatapaHkarma na tyAjya.n kAryameva tat | yaj~no dAnaM tapashchaiva pAvanAni manIShiNAm
raw_itrans.18.6: etAnyapi tu karmANi sa~Nga.n tyaktvA phalAni cha | kartavyAnIti me pArtha nishchitaM matamuttamam
raw_itrans.18.7: niyatasya tu sa.nnyAsaH karmaNo nopapadyate | mohAttasya parityAgastAmasaH parikIrtitaH
raw_itrans.18.8: duHkhamityeva yatkarma kAyakleshabhayAttyajet | sa kR^itvA rAjasaM tyAgaM naiva tyAgaphalaM labhet
raw_itrans.18.9: kAryamityeva yatkarma niyataM kriyate.arjuna | sa~Nga.n tyaktvA phala.n chaiva sa tyAgaH sAttviko mataH
raw_itrans.18.10: na dveShTyakushalaM karma kushale nAnuShajjate | tyAgI sattvasamAviShTo medhAvI Chinnasa.nshayaH
raw_itrans.18.11: na hi dehabhR^itA shakya.n tyaktuM karmANyasheShataH | yastu karmaphalatyAgI sa tyAgItyabhidhIyate
raw_itrans.18.12: aniShTamiShTaM mishra.n cha trividhaM karmaNaH phalam | bhavatyatyAginAM pretya na tu sa.nnyAsinA.n kvachit
raw_itrans.18.13: pa~nchaitAni mahAbAho kAraNAni nibodha me | sA~Nkhye kR^itAnte proktAni siddhaye sarvakarmaNAm
raw_itrans.18.14: adhiShThAnaM tathA kartA karaNa.n cha pR^ithagvidham | vividhAshcha pR^ithakcheShTA daiva.n chaivAtra pa~nchamam
raw_itrans.18.15: sharIravA~Nmanobhiryatkarma prArabhate naraH | nyAyya.n vA viparItaM vA pa~nchaite tasya hetavaH
raw_itrans.18.16: tatraivaM sati kartAramAtmAnaM kevalaM tu yaH | pashyatyakR^itabuddhitvAnna sa pashyati durmatiH
raw_itrans.18.17: yasya nAha~NkR^ito bhAvo buddhiryasya na lipyate | hatvA.api sa imA.NllokAnna hanti na nibadhyate
raw_itrans.18.18: j~nAnaM j~neyaM parij~nAtA trividhA karmachodanA | karaNaM karma karteti trividhaH karmasa~NgrahaH
raw_itrans.18.19: j~nAnaM karma cha kartA cha tridhaiva guNabhedataH | prochyate guNasa~NkhyAne yathAvachChR^iNu tAnyapi
raw_itrans.18.20: sarvabhUteShu yenaikaM bhAvamavyayamIkShate | avibhakta.n vibhakteShu tajj~nAnaM viddhi sAttvikam
raw_itrans.18.21: pR^ithaktvena tu yajj~nAnaM nAnAbhAvAnpR^ithagvidhAn | vetti sarveShu bhUteShu tajj~nAnaM viddhi rAjasam
raw_itrans.18.22: yattu kR^itsnavadekasminkArye saktamahaitukam | atattvArthavadalpa.n cha tattAmasamudAhR^itam
raw_itrans.18.23: niyataM sa~NgarahitamarAgadveShataH kR^itam | aphalaprepsunA karma yattatsAttvikamuchyate
raw_itrans.18.24: yattu kAmepsunA karma sAha~NkAreNa vA punaH | kriyate bahulAyAsaM tadrAjasamudAhR^itam
raw_itrans.18.25: anubandha.n kShayaM hi.nsAmanapekShya cha pauruSham | mohAdArabhyate karma yattattAmasamuchyate
raw_itrans.18.26: muktasa~Ngo.anaha.nvAdI dhR^ityutsAhasamanvitaH | sid.hdhyasid.hdhyornirvikAraH kartA sAttvika uchyate
raw_itrans.18.27: rAgI karmaphalaprepsurlubdho hi.nsAtmako.ashuchiH | harShashokAnvitaH kartA rAjasaH parikIrtitaH
raw_itrans.18.28: ayuktaH prAkR^itaH stabdhaH shaTho naiShkR^itiko.alasaH | viShAdI dIrghasUtrI cha kartA tAmasa uchyate
raw_itrans.18.29: buddherbhedaM dhR^iteshchaiva guNatastrividhaM shR^iNu | prochyamAnamasheSheNa pR^ithaktvena dhana~njaya
raw_itrans.18.30: pravR^itti.n cha nivR^itti.n cha kAryAkArye bhayAbhaye | bandhaM mokSha.n cha yA vetti buddhiH sA pArtha sAttvikI
raw_itrans.18.31: yayA dharmamadharma.n cha kArya.n chAkAryameva cha | ayathAvatprajAnAti buddhiH sA pArtha rAjasI
raw_itrans.18.32: adharma.n dharmamiti yA manyate tamasAvR^itA | sarvArthAnviparItA.nshcha buddhiH sA pArtha tAmasI
raw_itrans.18.33: dhR^ityA yayA dhArayate manaHprANendriyakriyAH | yogenAvyabhichAriNyA dhR^itiH sA pArtha sAttvikI
raw_itrans.18.34: yayA tu dharmakAmArthAndhR^ityA dhArayate.arjuna | prasa~Ngena phalAkA~NkShI dhR^itiH sA pArtha rAjasI
raw_itrans.18.35: yayA svapnaM bhayaM shokaM viShAdaM madameva cha | na vimu~nchati durmedhA dhR^itiH sA pArtha tAmasI
raw_itrans.18.36: sukhaM tvidAnI.n trividhaM shR^iNu me bharatarShabha | abhyAsAdramate yatra duHkhAnta.n cha nigachChati
raw_itrans.18.37: yattadagre viShamiva pariNAme.amR^itopamam | tatsukhaM sAttvikaM proktamAtmabuddhiprasAdajam
raw_itrans.18.39: yadagre chAnubandhe cha sukhaM mohanamAtmanaH | nidrAlasyapramAdottha.n tattAmasamudAhR^itam
raw_itrans.18.40: na tadasti pR^ithivyA.n vA divi deveShu vA punaH | sattvaM prakR^itijairmukta.n yadebhiH syAttribhirguNaiH
raw_itrans.18.41: brAhmaNakShatriyavishA.n shUdrANA.n cha parantapa | karmANi pravibhaktAni svabhAvaprabhavairguNaiH
raw_itrans.18.42: shamo damastapaH shauchaM kShAntirArjavameva cha | j~nAnaM vij~nAnamAstikyaM brahmakarma svabhAvajam
raw_itrans.18.43: shaurya.n tejo dhR^itirdAkShya.n yuddhe chApyapalAyanam | dAnamIshvarabhAvashcha kShAtraM karma svabhAvajam
raw_itrans.18.44: kR^iShigaurakShyavANijya.n vaishyakarma svabhAvajam | paricharyAtmakaM karma shUdrasyApi svabhAvajam
raw_itrans.18.45: sve sve karmaNyabhirataH sa.nsiddhi.n labhate naraH | svakarmanirataH siddhi.n yathA vindati tachChR^iNu
raw_itrans.18.46: yataH pravR^ittirbhUtAnA.n yena sarvamidaM tatam | svakarmaNA tamabhyarchya siddhi.n vindati mAnavaH
raw_itrans.18.47: shreyAnsvadharmo viguNaH paradharmAtsvanuShThitAt | svabhAvaniyataM karma kurvannApnoti kilbiSham
raw_itrans.18.48: sahajaM karma kaunteya sadoShamapi na tyajet | sarvArambhA hi doSheNa dhUmenAgnirivAvR^itAH
raw_itrans.18.49: asaktabuddhiH sarvatra jitAtmA vigataspR^ihaH | naiShkarmyasiddhiM paramA.n sa.nnyAsenAdhigachChati
raw_itrans.18.50: siddhiM prApto yathA brahma tathApnoti nibodha me | samAsenaiva kaunteya niShThA j~nAnasya yA parA
raw_itrans.18.51: bud.hdhyA vishuddhayA yukto dhR^ityAtmAnaM niyamya cha | shabdAdInviShayA.nstyaktvA rAgadveShau vyudasya cha
raw_itrans.18.52: viviktasevI laghvAshI yatavAkkAyamAnasaH | dhyAnayogaparo nitya.n vairAgya.n samupAshritaH
raw_itrans.18.53: aha~NkAraM balaM darpa.n kAmaM krodhaM parigraham | vimuchya nirmamaH shAnto brahmabhUyAya kalpate
raw_itrans.18.54: brahmabhUtaH prasannAtmA na shochati na kA~NkShati | samaH sarveShu bhUteShu madbhakti.n labhate parAm
raw_itrans.18.55: bhaktyA mAmabhijAnAti yAvAnyashchAsmi tattvataH | tato mAM tattvato j~nAtvA vishate tadanantaram
raw_itrans.18.56: sarvakarmANyapi sadA kurvANo mad.hvyapAshrayaH | matprasAdAdavApnoti shAshvataM padamavyayam
raw_itrans.18.57: chetasA sarvakarmANi mayi sa.nnyasya matparaH | buddhiyogamupAshritya machchittaH satataM bhava
raw_itrans.18.58: machchittaH sarvadurgANi matprasAdAttariShyasi | atha chettvamaha~NkArAnna shroShyasi vina~NkShyasi
raw_itrans.18.59: yadaha~NkAramAshritya na yotsya iti manyase | mithyaiSha vyavasAyaste prakR^itistvA.n niyokShyati
raw_itrans.18.60: svabhAvajena kaunteya nibaddhaH svena karmaNA | kartuM nechChasi yanmohAtkariShyasyavasho.api tat
raw_itrans.18.61: IshvaraH sarvabhUtAnA.n hR^iddeshe.arjuna tiShThati | bhrAmayansarvabhUtAni yantrArUDhAni mAyayA
raw_itrans.18.62: tameva sharaNaM gachCha sarvabhAvena bhArata | tatprasAdAtparAM shAntiM sthAnaM prApsyasi shAshvatam
raw_itrans.18.63: iti te j~nAnamAkhyAtaM guhyAd.hguhyataraM mayA | vimR^ishyaitadasheSheNa yathechChasi tathA kuru
raw_itrans.18.64: sarvaguhyatamaM bhUyaH shR^iNu me paramaM vachaH | iShTo.asi me dR^iDhamiti tato vakShyAmi te hitam
raw_itrans.18.65: manmanA bhava madbhakto madyAjI mA.n namaskuru | mAmevaiShyasi satya.n te pratijAne priyo.asi me
raw_itrans.18.66: sarvadharmAnparityajya mAmekaM sharaNaM vraja | ahaM tvA sarvapApebhyo mokShayiShyAmi mA shuchaH
raw_itrans.18.67: idaM te nAtapaskAya nAbhaktAya kadAchana | na chAshushrUShave vAchya.n na cha mA.n yo.abhyasUyati
raw_itrans.18.68: ya idaM paramaM guhyaM madbhakteShvabhidhAsyati | bhaktiM mayi parAM kR^itvA mAmevaiShyatyasa.nshayaH
raw_itrans.18.69: na cha tasmAnmanuShyeShu kashchinme priyakR^ittamaH | bhavitA na cha me tasmAdanyaH priyataro bhuvi
raw_itrans.18.70: adhyeShyate cha ya imaM dharmya.n sa.nvAdamAvayoH | j~nAnayaj~nena tenAhamiShTaH syAmiti me matiH
raw_itrans.18.71: shraddhAvAnanasUyashcha shR^iNuyAdapi yo naraH | so.api muktaH shubhA.NllokAnprApnuyAtpuNyakarmaNAm
raw_itrans.18.72: kachchidetachChrutaM pArtha tvayaikAgreNa chetasA | kachchidaj~nAnasammohaH pranaShTaste dhana~njaya
raw_itrans.18.73: arjuna uvAcha | naShTo mohaH smR^itirlabdhA tvatprasAdAnmayAchyuta | sthito.asmi gatasandehaH kariShye vachanaM tava
raw_itrans.18.74: sa~njaya uvAcha | ityahaM vAsudevasya pArthasya cha mahAtmanaH | sa.nvAdamimamashrauShamadbhutaM romaharShaNam
raw_itrans.18.76: rAjansa.nsmR^itya sa.nsmR^itya sa.nvAdamimamadbhutam | keshavArjunayoH puNyaM hR^iShyAmi cha muhurmuhuH
raw_itrans.18.77: tachcha sa.nsmR^itya sa.nsmR^itya rUpamatyadbhutaM hareH | vismayo me mahAn rAjanhR^iShyAmi cha punaH punaH
raw_itrans.18.78: yatra yogeshvaraH kR^iShNo yatra pArtho dhanurdharaH | tatra shrIrvijayo bhUtirdhruvA nItirmatirmama
